Republicans are lying to Pennsylvanians and undermining our democracy — all to perpetuate Trump’s Big Lie.

Their first hearing was a dud. It failed to produce any evidence to back up their accusations and satisfy the very people they’ve been lying to for the last ten months. The truth is: there was no fraud in this election. We had a free, fair, and safe election that Joe Biden won — and two legal, bipartisan audits confirmed it.

These Republicans continue to put conspiracy theories above our state constitution, above our democracy. And we need to put an end to it.

name: SUPREME COURT UPDATE (via DCCC)
subject: will you answer Speaker Pelosi’s call?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **DON 'T** delete this email.
**DON 'T** close your computer.
_**DON 'T let anti-choice Republicans get away with it!**___
Because the Supreme Court just announced that on December 1st, it will hear the **MOST SERIOUS** challenge to _Roe v. Wade_ yet.

**That 's why Speaker Pelosi is calling grassroots Democrats across the country -- including four from your community -- to action at this crucial moment for reproductive rights:**

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-jf4RE-)

We can't afford to let Speaker Pelosi down.

_**Not **after Trump and his Republicans packed the courts with anti-choice, right-wing judges.

**Not** after Republicans in Texas just enacted the most restrictive abortion ban in history.

**And not** after the far-right Supreme Court just announced it would hear a case that could destroy reproductive rights as we know them._

**Our House Majority is a crucial line of defense against anti-choice Republicans and their horrific schemes.**

If we allow Trump and his Republican allies to retake power, there's no telling what they'll do to reproductive rights.

**[So at this make-or-break moment for the freedoms enshrined in _Roe v. Wade_ , can we count on you to chip in $3 to ANSWER Speaker Pelosi's call, ELECT pro-choice House Democrats, and DEFEND our critical House Majority?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_)**

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Let's turn this around.
body:
And let's start NOW. [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cttaid-yddjllujiu-r/) Fellow Patriot, Under President Biden, we're lurching from crisis to crisis.In just the past few months, it's gotten worse than ever.
* **Global embarrassment** in Afghanistan, when the administration abandoned our citizens and allies.
* **Horrifying conditions** on the border, and unscreened immigrants released into our communities.
* **Skyrocketing crime, inflation, and intrusions on our freedoms, **thanks to bad decisions in Washington.

**_WE NEED A CHANGE._** That's why I'm reaching out to **[you](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cttaid-yddjllujiu-y/)** to fight back - NOW, not next month or next year. [END-OF-QUARTER DEADLINE >>> CHIP IN NOW!](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cttaid-yddjllujiu-t/) **We can't afford to wait any longer!** We're going from crisis to crisis already, and we need to take back the majority before it gets worse.**[I'm asking you to step up and chip in $250, $100, $50, $25 or even just $10 NOW!](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cttaid-yddjllujiu-i/)****Thanks for rushing your support!** -Glenn Grothman [CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORT >> CHIP IN NOW!](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cttaid-yddjllujiu-d/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkMFKxDAQhp8me0tJJ22ze-ihbqsriIKi4qlM08k2kGaXNlV8e7Pr6sGTEAL5ZuYj8_clZCqTtLIlCEjFBgoh8wLWSZoUsihqpZRIq7xapxuWiRH3iDrYg0dHU0j0YVwNpVYKUtwIs0bSqc6MEV2eCtoYKEBRvnLlEMJxZrJicB3PTHqZKPmwfqL-JIksEI58oGnWAzluvY7M4eL1wGfkE5PXSxjb-bBMmpisJ3pnUJyQxvGIdu8j_O6_8JF6u4yR0ojWRTjr-LhsCe2ueXza7pq7tmnap6q9q57vtzt-dfvQPjYvkfzYDz6QD3HSa8dv6tfXOsO3RsZy653tY-EPnM-QCFOpTMZN1xmegej5GvOcY9dLmaE01HWrqeyPH9Y5Oxcqprs_ffScaVzJWfNZMnXFAJYlKgHO8cF_xKdm2MY7fB7pd_IiTS55AFP1F-O6m5Y)

Friend,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkFFrgzAQxz9NfIvoJRr74INt7TooG3RslL1IjGcNxLRobNd9-qVdt4c9DUIgv7v7kfs3OXDBGQY6hwjiaAZpxJIUsjAOU5amSyFEFBdJkcUzwqNe7qVUTh-sNDi4UB36oMtbmWQKZhkDaHk6Qw4RixOueC1UVic8MHnn3HEkrCCw8mdENQ0YnrUdsLlKPHMoe9rhMKoODdVWeWbkZFVHR0kHwlaT66vxMA0KCVsOeCKQXpGS_VHqvfXwu__Oe2z01HuKvdTGw1H5x31LqNbl9mWxLjdVWVYvRbUpXp8Wazp_fK625ZsnP_aDdWidn7TK0N1pl8kP9f754MuVNbrxhT9wvEFEGTPRctrWdUt9Ig3NZJJQWTeMcclarOtgyJvjWRujx1T4dPfXj94y9SsZ3V5yIuYEYJq8EuAWH_xHfG2Ghb_d5Yi_k3dpeM8DiFh-AexWnII)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one – **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is – if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia – and our country – is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Slandering Our Country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Let’s drop the pretenses. They hate us. Across the country this summer, the elite Left has finally come out of the closet
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| |
---
Fellow Patriot:

Let’s drop the pretenses. **They hate us.**

Across the country this summer, the elite Left has finally come out of the closet as the anti-American bigots they have always been.

▶︎ On July 3rd, the _New York Times_ ran a 1,500-word story about how **the American flag was divisive.**

▶︎ The same day, a progressive pundit and former MSNBC host wrote a column headlined **“F--- Fourth of July.”**

▶︎ On July 4th, Michigan Congresswoman Cori Bush **bashed America as racist.**

▶︎ A state Black Lives Matter group called the American flag **a “symbol of hate.”**

This may be shocking, but it’s not surprising. This is what the Left really believes. They think we are the bad guys – hateful and racist.

**That’s why the Left is all in on CRITICAL RACE THEORY. They want to force their fake, bigoted narrative of anti-American racism on America’s schoolchildren.**

**[And it’s why the House Freedom Fund is fighting back!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztgv98n96mfq6rqu81gur0g0uvpaagv058qkflb0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdim2o36c3h2bs)**

This is not just another fight in the culture war. If we lose this battle, and progressives teach our children to hate their country, their parents, and themselves, there may not be another fight.

Conservatives in the states are stepping up against Critical Racist Theory. They are following President Trump’s lead and banning CRT from government employee training and school curricula.

But now the deep-pocketed teachers’ unions are planning to sue. **They want liberal judges to cram CRT down kids’ throats over parents’ and taxpayers’ objections.**

America’s state legislators and governors and moms and dads need help. They’re holding strong for now, but to truly help them, conservatives NEED to win back the House in 2022.

**[Please help us elect conservative leaders who will keep their word and actually fight the Left's attacks on Americans.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfpijdepr0dea8clqh4rcjko2v4afolc8lssr0jo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdim2o36c3h2bs)**

We need to send a signal to Joe Biden, and the teachers' unions, and the media, and the school boards that we’re not going to take it anymore. This is OUR country.

**The United States is the greatest nation in the world. Our flag is not divisive – it’s a beacon of hope. Our history is not a story of hypocrisy, but courage, of freedom overcoming oppression.**

The radical, racist Left are the new oppressors we must now overcome. The way we do it is to run, nominate, and elect tough, principled conservatives in races across the country.

HFF only endorses men and women committed to ending CRT and MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.

**[Help elect conservatives to Congress with a split contribution to supports these three outstanding candidates:](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn2u9a87o2nm81cfgpmtbjrr0mndag1k8cqr6h3g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdim2o36c3h2bs)**

✅ U.S. Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-CO)
✅ U.S. Rep. Yvette Herrell (R-NM)
✅ U.S. Rep. Scott Perry (R-PA)

The Left thinks CRT is a winning issue for them. They’re wrong. It’s a losing issue because the American people are sick and tired of elitists calling us names, slandering our country, and lying to our kids.

**[Now is the time to win this fight.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7k26220kpb9p8hqpm4k6s3d8b3n4msl899gving_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdim2o36c3h2bs)**

Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help send conservative fighters to Washington.

Sincerely,
Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund
|
---
**END OF THE MONTH**
**COUNTDOWN**
|
---

|
---
_**"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." – Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)**_
|

House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.

America’s state legislators and governors and moms and dads need help. They’re holding strong for now, but to truly help them, conservatives NEED to win back the House in 2022. We need to send a signal to Joe Biden, and the teachers' unions, and the media, and the school boards that we’re not going to take it anymore. This is OUR country. The United States is the greatest nation in the world. Our flag is not divisive – it’s a beacon of hope. Our history is not a story of hypocrisy, but courage, of freedom overcoming oppression. The radical, racist Left are the new oppressors we must now overcome. The way we do it is to run, nominate, and elect tough, principled conservatives in races across the country. HFF only endorses men and women committed to ending CRT and MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. ✅ U.S. Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-CO) ✅ U.S. Rep. Yvette Herrell (R-NM) ✅ U.S. Rep. Scott Perry (R-PA) The Left thinks CRT is a winning issue for them. They’re wrong. It’s a losing issue because the American people are sick and tired of elitists calling us names, slandering our country, and lying to our kids. Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help send conservative fighters to Washington. Sincerely, Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund | END OF THE MONTH COUNTDOWN | | "The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." – Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH) | House Freedom Fund 300 Independence Ave SE Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans. Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. HOUSEFREEDOMFUND.COM 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Senator Chuck Grassley
subject: I’m Running for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
Please Open Immediately
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0isg1g9u4krn21r4n3egr38d8nepuvkurv0vego_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1pb2egqj4pr46dr6adjnmgqb4o74sapr8obkc5i31db36sqe8c5i69qn5d1lc3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eap6cc9kmmq3fdr3coq61cj26pp238h1e8he4933cph66pb5c3j60oh5u)
Please Open Immediately

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7lh1g7go9tml5u59dn4l1tgre67nmadimoso9t8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdimao76c1h2bs)
---

Friends:

**I needed you to hear this from me personally:_I am running for re-election to continue representing the people of Iowa in the U.S Senate._

_As we get the new campaign underway, Barbara and I want to share some of our favorite moments from previous campaigns. Check out the mash-up we made for you._**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcfsvb9fltf9r6ui9bas0e2onm4u1brrum2nk8io_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdimao76c1h2bs)

_Representing the people of Iowa is a great honor._ It is a privilege to listen to your concerns, and make our communities and our country stronger than ever. I am thankful for your support and want you to know that I never take that for granted. In these uncertain times of chaos and polarization, Iowa needs steady and effective leadership you can count on. We’ve accomplished a lot but there’s more work to do. Winning Iowa is key to taking back control of the United States Senate. We need to change course and get America back on track with Republican leadership.

As a farmer, I live life by a simple code: you keep working until the job is done. When you look at Washington today, you can see there is still a lot of work to do. I’m committed to making our country a better place for our kids and grandkids. I’m working as hard as ever.

**[I’m asking for your support so I can continue to bring common sense conservative values to Washington.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6cb7kd2srmjn567meqt0p5cgj41hmpfgtcosijg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdimao76c1h2bs)**

I work hard to earn your trust and Iowans count on me to do what I say I’ll do. That’s exactly what I’ve done, and will continue to do in the U.S. Senate. What you see is what you get.

So, I hope you will come running with me in this race. I know I’m geared up and ready to take on the Radical Left, are you?

| [**RUN WITH ME**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1ijb9qncqi8sqm0cssd341dahj1qetd5fo7702g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdimao76c1h2bs)
---

**[Whatever you donate, I can promise you it’ll go directly toward our grassroots movement to Take Back the Senate.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5ruqlf993k42nuh9va1m0ot5deq9bi9576o8ut8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdimao76c1h2bs)**

**_2022 is about to be a big year._**

| [$5](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg4n0tp20cvd3jcdnugknjqtmn7vlsoqpbfcem08_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdimao76c1h2bs "Grassley for Senate")
---
| [$10](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9b1jdbvov3ag28d1pm340aur42i2n87o7c6b4jo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdimao76c1h2bs "Grassley for Senate")
---
| [$50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3ngu2cl3l2akhmpssjf23j18uni4udifddiuvno_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdimao76c1h2bs "Grassley for Senate")
---
| [$100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl69tr5u14fdtvp93kbvmgscnnurvhg75rni1m5o_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdimao76c1h2bs "Grassley for Senate")
---
| [$500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc1dhk2vcfh94evarbpsff3buh2notnel8qdtfhg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdimao76c1h2bs "Grassley for Senate")
---
| [$1000](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqhbmv4vne5s5grthq6825beg5ovvtnq78j0mrd0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdimao76c1h2bs "Grassley for Senate")
---

I love my work and I will always work harder than anyone on your behalf.

Thank you and God Bless,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1lva15s5r0sm3h4n6qvrcj30g60a1b20bqhhh1g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdimao76c1h2bs)

Senator Chuck Grassley

Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc.

---

name: Team Rayner
subject: We’re back with the #RaynerRundown Newsletter!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELE FOR FLORIDA
body:
THE RAYNER RUNDOWN

Peter, welcome back to the #RaynerRundown Newsletter!

When it comes to challenging the status quo, Michele Rayner’s track record is incredible. Whether it's economic equality, voting rights, LGBTQ+ rights, or combating systemic racism, Michele has not hesitated to make her voice heard and be on the right side of history.

Our neighbors, family, and friends in the 13th district of Florida are working two and three jobs just to make ends meet. And while we’re experiencing unprecedented times, her level of compassion for the people has become a cornerstone of our communities.

In the face of Republican attempts to bully us into submission, we are focused on speaking truth to power. Not only do we speak it, but we live it too .

And did you hear? One of our Republican opponents just landed an endorsement from Donald Trump...and suddenly, the stakes just got THAT much higher.

MICHELE ON SOCIAL MEDIA

"We have been warning about the consequences of a politicized supreme court when there was still time to change course. Now, the decision to allow the oppressive Texas anti-abortion laws to stand is putting lives in jeopardy and setting a dangerous path that other right-leaning state legislatures will follow in a desperate and shameful attempt to rile up their bases and stay in power. A woman's right to choose must be protected and we in Florida must stay vigilant so that this wave of barbaric and unconstitutional chaos does not reach our shores. "

Link to tweet >> https://twitter.com/RepMKRG/status/1433491469910880257

"I am requesting @POTUS and the @WhiteHouse do what our Governor won't: Step up and act to relieve our overburdened healthcare facilities and frontline workers. With our ICU's at 94% capacity, I am asking that a medical ship be sent to Florida. Please listen:"

Link to tweet >> https://twitter.com/RepMKRG/status/1432763360542695424

IN THE NEWS

88.5 WMNF: Pinellas parents rally for mandatory masks in schools as the delta variant continues to hospitalize children

Link to article >> https://www.wmnf.org/pinellas-parents-rally-for-mandatory-masks-in-schools-as-the-delta-variant-continues-to-hospitalize-children/

Hunkering Down continues: Michele Rayner and Anna Eskamani

Link to podcast >> https://podcasts.google.com/feed/aHR0cHM6Ly9mZWVkcy5maXJlc2lkZS5mbS9odW5rZXJpbmdkb3duL3Jzcw/episode/NWI4OTIyZDktMzI2Mi00NmYxLWE4ODAtMjRmOTIzZTdmOTg3?hl=en&ved=2ahUKEwi5ruyT7ZfzAhX0MVkFHQjABfIQieUEegQIAhAF&ep=6

Tweet from Floricua: Rep. Michele Rayner @RepMKRG who is running for Congress in 2022, wants to make sure that “there are opportunities for economic advancement” for all Floridians across the state.

Link to tweet >> https://twitter.com/floricuas/status/1428377696216784898

OUT AND ABOUT

Last weekend, Michele was invited to be 1 of 7 candidates at the Congressional Black Caucus retreat.

From Michele:
The CBC has shown time and time again that Black candidates CAN and DO win -- even when we are told to wait our turn.
Grateful to Rep. Lucy McBath who looked me in my eyes and told me “Don’t stop. We need you.”

ENDORSEMENT ALERT

Way To Lead: Endorses Michele Rayner Florida 13th Congressional District
Link to tweet >> https://twitter.com/waytoleadus/status/1436417541585395717

The Collective PAC: Endorsement of Michele Rayner For Congress

Link to tweet >> https://twitter.com/collectivepac/status/1300509353603145728

This is a people-powered campaign. Help us keep the momentum going!

DONATE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2109_email_rayner?refcode=em21_210926_raynerrundown

FOLLOW MICHELE ON FACEBOOK >> https://www.facebook.com/micheleforfl/

FOLLOW MICHELE ON TWITTER >> https://twitter.com/micheleforfl/media

FOLLOW MICHELE ON INSTAGRAM >> https://www.instagram.com/micheleforfl/

P.O. Box 35218
St. Petersburg, Fl 33705

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f3edf421-f916-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/e5ce540a-d21e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWNlNTQwYS1kMjFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cQaxclguh8yonFFKeJ5S-NGNeqLqvHPG4NVuUPANBh4=&id=140435042 .

name: Adam Schiff
subject: You’ve been hearing from us a lot -- here’s why:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
Every three months, we file a report of our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. |
#
Derek, For the past few days, my team and I have been talking a lot about the FEC deadline and what it means for our chances of keeping the House and Senate beyond the midterms. Here’s why this Thursday deadline is so important: Every three months, we file a report of our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. We account for every single penny we raised, who it’s from, and how much cash we have on hand. Republican and Democratic strategists alike pore over these numbers to determine vulnerabilities, opportunities, and where to invest heading into the next election. And because I’ve spent the last few years standing up to Donald Trump and the authoritarian cult of personality that the GOP has become, our report is especially important — because while we try to support every Democratic candidate who has a chance to win, that support only goes as far as the resources we can raise. And that’s where you come in, Derek. Our average donation is only **_$16.95_** , and it goes a long way. We wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t so vitally important to keeping our majorities — and keeping Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy out of power next year. **Will you rush in a donation of $10, $16.95, $25, or whatever you can afford today to help my campaign hit our FEC deadline goal? We need all hands on deck to defend and expand our Democratic Majorities next year.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36484714/308227611/581033598?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20210926_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGNlNTQwYS1kMjFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XIe14d7I_Q418kLQJldXdyMUWKoHnxqOHo92riffkIo=)

clean_body: Every three months, we file a report of our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. | Derek, For the past few days, my team and I have been talking a lot about the FEC deadline and what it means for our chances of keeping the House and Senate beyond the midterms. Here’s why this Thursday deadline is so important: Every three months, we file a report of our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. We account for every single penny we raised, who it’s from, and how much cash we have on hand. Republican and Democratic strategists alike pore over these numbers to determine vulnerabilities, opportunities, and where to invest heading into the next election. And because I’ve spent the last few years standing up to Donald Trump and the authoritarian cult of personality that the GOP has become, our report is especially important — because while we try to support every Democratic candidate who has a chance to win, that support only goes as far as the resources we can raise. And that’s where you come in, Derek. Our average donation is only $16.95 , and it goes a long way. We wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t so vitally important to keeping our majorities — and keeping Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy out of power next year. Will you rush in a donation of $10, $16.95, $25, or whatever you can afford today to help my campaign hit our FEC deadline goal? We need all hands on deck to defend and expand our Democratic Majorities next year. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for all you do. — Adam Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States

Friends -
In a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to our campaign for Senate in North Carolina. But first, will you give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important?
After we close the books on our FEC deadline, we’re going to start getting questions from folks. They’ll want to know all about our fundraising numbers, as a way to size up our campaign.
They’ll be looking for not just how much we raise but whether or not we’ve got the grassroots strength to defeat the extreme Republicans in this race.
You see, they know that our opponents will spend and say anything to try to win. Some pundits even question whether Democrats have any chance of holding the Senate majority at all, so it is our job to work together to prove them wrong.
That’s why we are aiming to receive as many individual donations as we can get before this FEC deadline comes to an end. Each one helps us demonstrate that our campaign has the momentum and people power necessary to flip this seat.
[**Will you make a contribution of any amount to our campaign before our biggest FEC deadline yet? I would not ask if these contributions were not so important, but time is quickly running out before the deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36489045/308233779/1741212721?refcode2=dfea4a3b-d61e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&refcode=em210926-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmVhNGEzYi1kNjFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xjSfNLXQek9mE7FIT9mMPZrQpSXg6yWRHg0k-oLCNaQ=)

To put it bluntly: **2% is not enough to defeat Ron Johnson.**

Other campaigns have Wall Street and Big Pharma to back them. _But not us_ — this campaign is for the people, powered by the people.

[We’re dependent on grassroots supporters like you, team. Chip in now to help us reach our goal >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36490499/308238746/594431030?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210926_1_2&refcode2=20e96b6c-da1e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGU5NmI2Yy1kYTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xn1mfxreTNXg90hgvcq_Fvs71ax2RuMVAwxRt-ETBEI=) | | **[CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36490500/308238747/594431030?amount=5&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210926_1_2&refcode2=20e96b6c-da1e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGU5NmI2Yy1kYTFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xn1mfxreTNXg90hgvcq_Fvs71ax2RuMVAwxRt-ETBEI=)**

**_— Begin Forwarded Message —_**

Here’s the state of this race:
* More candidates have entered the race, increasing the competition.
* Many polls have come out, including one showing we’re leading Ron Johnson. Here’s a graphic that I’m sure you’ve seen a few times to remind you ↓↓↓

* Our opponent, Ron Johnson has continued to spread dangerous conspiracies and lies on COVID and election “fraud” — _very on brand for everyone’s crazy uncle in the Senate._

With all of this happening, our opponents, dark money groups, and grassroots donors are clamoring for a viable campaign. We need to prove without a shadow of a doubt that we are the campaign that will defeat Ron Johnson — if we don’t and we have a weak report that shows signs of slowing down, we lose our momentum.

[To make sure that doesn't happen, we’re aiming to raise $30,000 from 3,000 donors by Thursday at midnight, _our Q3 FEC deadline_. Your support before this FEC deadline will help us prove to everybody what we already know: _We can and will defeat Ron Johnson._

**I am proud of our "Full Nelson" tour where so far, I'm the only candidate to visit every single county in our state. We did 72 counties in 43 days, putting over 5,000 miles on my car, campaigning in every corner of the state since that's the type of work ethic we will need to beat Ron Johnson. clean_body: I’m counting on you. | = Hey folks — Last quarter my wife, Susan, bet me she could raise more money than I could before our quarterly deadline. I took her up on it and lost 2 to 1 — not my best work. Since then, I helped pass the bipartisan infrastructure package to continue making progress, like we did with the American Rescue Plan, which kept 3 million kids out of poverty after the first month and is on track to cut child poverty nearly in half this year alone. All that to say: I think this time around I’ve got a pretty good chance at outraising Susan, so I challenged her to round 2. Can you help me win this bet and stay on track for fundraising this quarter by pitching in $10 before Thursday’s end-of-quarter deadline? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Winning this bet isn’t nearly as important as winning this campaign so I can continue serving folks like you. Since grassroots supporters helped Democrats win majorities in Congress, we’ve been delivering for Coloradans and Americans, despite partisan obstruction from Mitch McConnell. Only one seat stands in the way of halting the progress we’ve made. So, I have to ask: = Thanks for all your help, — Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

subject: Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell

body:
We could lose this race and Mitch McConnell would surely become Senate Majority Leader.
#

Friends —
We’re writing to ask if you can make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s Senate campaign before our official FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close.
Mark is constantly under attack from outside spending groups and if we don’t have the resources we need to fight back, we could lose this race and Mitch McConnell would surely become Senate Majority Leader.
We’re sorry to put that thought into your head, but it’s the truth.
And it’s why we have to ask:
[**Can you PLEASE make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s Senate campaign before our FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close and we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210926-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1389_6688874_-wijvM&akid=1389%2E6688874%2E-wijvM)

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Reaching out respectfully for $3
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Donations from real working people like you are what fund our work
#

Friend,
I’m reaching out to ask you to donate $3 to our campaign before our federally mandated end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on Thursday.
Will you give me a moment to explain why your $3 is so important? Here’s the short of it:
* Pennsylvania is the #1 most important Senate race in the country
* The fate of our Senate majority hangs in the balance
* Our race is super competitive (and expensive) already
* It’s going to take all of us doing our part to replace Republican Pat Toomey with a Democrat who will fight for working families next fall

[If that’s all you need to know, will you make that $3 contribution to help us build an unstoppable coalition of working folks to win this race? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36494375/308254175/-353695395?refcode2=54f7d1c6-e31e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&refcode=em210926-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGY3ZDFjNi1lMzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTVkwGsBXzJlvz3eOXyPOAqCLVHYTUv0ezpuVb6NUlI=)
**[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36494376/308254176/-353695395?refcode2=54f7d1c6-e31e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&refcode=em210926-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGY3ZDFjNi1lMzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTVkwGsBXzJlvz3eOXyPOAqCLVHYTUv0ezpuVb6NUlI=)**
Our strategy to win this race is simple.
We must rally a huge coalition of working people behind our bold agenda centered on racial, economic, and environmental justice that works for working people.
But do you want to know the key to our strategy? It's you.
That’s because donations from real working people like you are what fund our work.
Your support helps me share my story of growing up dirt poor in the North Philly projects and helps fuel our grassroots organizing efforts across the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania.
[That’s why I’m asking for your $3 today. If you can spare a few bucks ahead of our federally mandated end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on Thursday, it would mean so much.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36494384/308254179/-353695395?refcode2=54f7d1c6-e31e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&refcode=em210926-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGY3ZDFjNi1lMzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTVkwGsBXzJlvz3eOXyPOAqCLVHYTUv0ezpuVb6NUlI=)
**[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36494389/308254191/-353695395?refcode2=54f7d1c6-e31e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&refcode=em210926-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGY3ZDFjNi1lMzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTVkwGsBXzJlvz3eOXyPOAqCLVHYTUv0ezpuVb6NUlI=)**
Thanks for being a part of our fight to build a government that works for working people.
Malcolm

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I'm no stranger to tough fights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
I'm worried, friends. New Hampshire is shaping up to be the most competitive Senate race of 2022. Just last year, Joe Biden won this state by a single-digit margin – but New Hampshire Republicans flipped both chambers of the state legislature. This battleground state has a long history of swinging between parties, and it will be no different in 2022. With our slim 50-50 majority, control of the Senate could even come down to this seat. So when I see that we're not on track to meet our weekend goal right before our public reporting deadline, it makes me worried. I'm no stranger to tough fights. In 2016, I won my race by only 1,017 votes — that's 0.14 percent. I know that we can hold this seat and protect our vulnerable Senate majority, but it's going to take all of us working together. **[So I'm humbly asking: can you rush $5 before midnight tonight? What you give will help my team build a robust on-the-ground campaign and allow us to communicate with voters across the Granite State.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36494714/308255953/-1669436104?refcode=e20210926_mwh-worried-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Y2OWNiZi1lNDFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jFTHIWlS6YORY1JrEhuVJiEgNfLFQ9NzDHsL8qF8wTY=)** | | [CHIP IN $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36494716/308255955/-1669436104?refcode=e20210926_mwh-worried-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Y2OWNiZi1lNDFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jFTHIWlS6YORY1JrEhuVJiEgNfLFQ9NzDHsL8qF8wTY=)
---
Thank you in advance.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: | | | I'm worried, friends. New Hampshire is shaping up to be the most competitive Senate race of 2022. Just last year, Joe Biden won this state by a single-digit margin – but New Hampshire Republicans flipped both chambers of the state legislature. This battleground state has a long history of swinging between parties, and it will be no different in 2022. With our slim 50-50 majority, control of the Senate could even come down to this seat. So when I see that we're not on track to meet our weekend goal right before our public reporting deadline, it makes me worried. I'm no stranger to tough fights. In 2016, I won my race by only 1,017 votes — that's 0.14 percent. I know that we can hold this seat and protect our vulnerable Senate majority, but it's going to take all of us working together. = | | = Thank you in advance. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
As we wrap the summer, I know there is a lot on your mind. There has been so much going on. It is at times like these when I want to hear from you the most. I want to make sure that we continue to advocate for the things that matter to you so that I can carry your voice with me to Washington. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36496234/308261641/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmEwY2EyZi1lYjFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E4yByyfAMax-d-t4yenay1bAUCF1WNhKFB_EttKR8iQ=&emci=dec2a6da-621d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=d6a0ca2f-eb1e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=15529135) | As we wrap the summer, I know there is a lot on your mind. name: Kathy Barnette for Senate
subject: Kathy Barnette Calls for Full Forensic Audit of 2020 Election in Pennsylvania.
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dxe6wwEjaivQmhaRlsqMMZolpLMrqokuQiCwJeI6Wxfiw9oBZMelkzCZy5zgSpRsMgVU-Qhb4YGp44E1bN2g3Jprvlp1RlVRIcygFVObPV6jylcL3wMdVjU0n_1kCKGIGy6SzKnp-6sFBodnPNx4PQ==&c=xNiUoy1g-U6QryrFaWc9bTYXbx_VxryEx49fd8l9_nx_ZMp0pQAcpw==&ch=OmgaWjTmtqEBqzXrtbMeSO6H9uDcHHRM7xRtb8ablqm2friLxnIYyg==)
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Press Contact: [info@barnetteforsenate.com](mailto:info@barnetteforsenate.com) September 26, 2021
---
| Kathy Barnette, Candidate for U.S. Senate, Calls for Full Forensic Audit of 2020 Election in Pennsylvania.
---
| "Election integrity is the lifeblood of America's representative democracy and, thus, the revelation of the multitude of gross irregularities and potential criminal behavior in Maricopa County, Arizona during the 2020 election mandates that Pennsylvania performs a full forensic audit of what occurred statewide - from registration to tabulation," said Kathy Barnette, candidate for the United States Senate.
"What occurred in Maricopa County also occurred in Montgomery County," said Barnette, recalling how she proved deceased and "ghosts" had voted in her Congressional race in 2020.
"Arizona's report is demonstrating that the 2020 election was not as pure as the driven snow," said Barnette. "Such a detailed study will either find proof of substantial election fraud that will drive election security reform efforts, or will show a safe and secure election and give Pennsylvanians confidence in the Commonwealth's ability to protect their votes. A detailed investigation is what the people demand, and elected officials need to hear and understand that demand.
"As your Senator, I will do everything I can to honor the demand that elections be free and fair. Protecting the vote cast by a citizen necessitates discounting votes cast illegally," Barnette added.
"No one should be silenced by the Left simply for raising concerns and wanting us to improve our election system going forward. If people cannot trust the results, the future of our nation is at stake."
###
---
| |
---
| | |
---

body:
Almost a month ago, we launched this campaign to bring new leadership to Tennessee. At every step of the way since then, I’ve been humbled by the response from Tennesseans like you — whether you’ve come to one of the stops on our 95 County Tour, or responded to our survey to tell us what matters most to you in Tennessee’s next governor, or gave your hard-earned dollars to fuel this campaign, I’m so proud to have your support. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36496741/308263148/-1314262958?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210926eoq1rs_JM_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWEwY2EyZi1lYjFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qN7kUO9wlw-VRNOkUoKFzYBSlIzTvr5fvfqYdhaY-_g=)
---
Hey Peter. Almost a month ago, we launched this campaign to bring new leadership to Tennessee. At every step of the way since then, I’ve been humbled by the response from Tennesseans like you — whether you’ve come to one of the stops on our 95 County Tour, or responded to our survey to tell us what matters most to you in Tennessee’s next governor, or gave your hard-earned dollars to fuel this campaign, I’m so proud to have your support. I’ve said it a hundred times already, but it never gets old: This is _**our**_ campaign. It’s a collective movement of people all across our great state to reclaim what is ours and bring dignity, compassion, and honesty back to the governorship. [**Our first big fundraising deadline is coming up at the end of this month, and we’ve got to make sure we show how strong this grassroots movement is by gathering as many small-dollar donations as possible. They’re run by pro-Democrat liberals and coastal elites who hate his America First message. They want to silence our movement! But there’s good news! President Trump is considering starting his own social media site! But first, he needs to know whether Republican Patriots like you would follow him there (or stick with Big Tech). Please respond in the next 10 MINUTES and let us know where you stand. | | Thank you. Trump Social Media Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

Sorry for dropping into your inbox again, but House Democrats just outraised Republicans by over FOUR MILLION dollars... And now I'm hearing my father's top allies in Congress are also 928 contributions behind their critical End-of-Quarter deadline. We already fell dangerously behind last month. If it happens again, I'm afraid the budgets of our swing state campaign operations could COMPLETELY DRY UP. We desperately need some American heroes to step up to the plate before midnight tonight. ** \-- Jim Jordan asked \-- Kevin McCarthy asked \-- Steve Scalise asked \-- Tim Scott asked \-- Marco Rubio asked \-- Newt Gingrich asked I really hope that's enough to convince you of the urgency of the situation. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Keep Florida Free
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=503e09fc567a26094633ab27bab7b2ebd62a94713533f021a9268abfb862e0c456247717d54ce0c2e3d2295aa4023d45ba07ba4872ca7fd763633a56ace72b24f9024c726f36c9bd

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=88275c4d863e93a9eca56614c283360d23e9129603a477db3cedb5949c70ea91c4f0998d79cc5ae9c7c3edd6d09f2d2d6506d82cb96d5323

Dear Peter,

Thank you for joining me in the fight to keep Florida FREE!

While we have already accomplished so much, I have only just begun to fight and having you alongside me makes all the difference.

Since taking the oath of office and becoming Florida’s governor, I have been a leader who the people of Florida can count on to do what’s right. Other politicians cowered in fear to Big Tech, but we took them head-on. We gave Floridians a chance to fight back against these Big Tech oligarchs and a mechanism to hold them accountable for their political censorship with their illegitimate attempts to crack down on free speech.

While some states allowed COVID to serve as a Trojan horse that dismantled their free and fair elections, I REFUSED to allow Florida’s elections to be compromised. As a result, we securely counted over 11 million ballots before midnight on Election Day during the 2020 election.

After what we saw in other states during 2020, I knew we must act to secure our elections before Democrats could use COVID as an excuse to hijack our fair election process. I signed legislation to strengthen and further secure Florida’s election system, including banning ballot harvesting, unsolicited mail ballots and "Zuckerbucks."

I reject Biden's disastrous open order policies and the drugs, crime, and human trafficking that flows unabated over our southern border as a result. That’s why I was the first governor to answer the call for assistance from governors of Texas and Arizona, and why I sent Florida law enforcement to help aid with securing our country.

I also BANNED sanctuary cities in Florida, and after the riots and destruction we saw take place in other cities in 2020, I signed the strictest anti-rioting legislation anywhere in America. I will never allow us to become a safe haven for crime in this state. Our law enforcement deserves our steadfast support, and with the sacrifices they make to keep our communities safe each and every day, we were able to provide every sworn first responder in Florida with a $1,000 bonus.

As other states used COVID as an opportunity to impose authoritarian restrictions, I protected the right of Floridians to work, operate a business, and make decisions for themselves. I followed the data and kept Florida open and kept kids in school. Without our efforts in the face of scrutiny from Democratic politicians and corporate media shills, who knows what the nationwide business and education climate would be today. In an effort to make Florida’s education system the best in America, I signed the largest school choice expansion anywhere in the country. We are expanding civics education to give students the tools they need to effectively fulfill their civic duty as citizens, all while BANNING critical race theory from the classroom.

Because of my leadership, Florida has become a beacon of light for the rest of America. We represent freedom, personal liberty, and opportunity for everyone. There is still much to fight for and much left to accomplish, which is why your continued support is vital. Thanks to you, we can continue to meet the strongest of challenges and overcome the tallest hurdles.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cec3d1fbccf1f5e150175f7d2f48a7d34b2bf7703d9661f7d84d5dda0c6aa62ab294b6f19a2f76d7e3a19d1b42d6194aa3ee0e70173a2509
Please CLICK HERE to see how your support has been essential to our efforts!

Thank you for your support and just know, I have only begun to fight!

Sincerely,

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cec3d1fbccf1f5e18b9026da6de2b57c78acd0327069e0d1c5e091f58318b98e4e050dab1b4b8383e8bb04f9d275f09f768ffc85724b2992

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cec3d1fbccf1f5e1509646bd6276e7c8d9e3492dc50e5e3df75084ee00798c7bccf4f169a47e0ebb3875c0c54556e8b996dab22ce4e394e3

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cec3d1fbccf1f5e1cfb5d547261825a9f4cb69ae5fd35f9fbfd2b502a5f18fc46829c0c672c3bdcaff13d6fae1362ab6a2f099b9d24bde87

Sponsored by Friends of Ron DeSantis.

----------------------------------------

This email was sent by:
Friends of Ron DeSantis
Andalusia Ave
Talahasse, FL, 32311, US

body:
Every step brings us that much closer to winning Ohio for Democrats. | Hey there, It’s a long road to Election Day, but every day on this campaign, we take steps and achieve goals that bring us a little bit closer to flipping Ohio blue and writing a comeback story for our state’s hardworking families. **A major goal comes in just four days.** This month, we’ve set our highest online fundraising goal since we announced our campaign: **$20,000**. It’s ambitious, but I know that we can get there with your support — and any amount that you can give will go a long way. **_[We can’t afford to fall short. Chip in any amount towards our September fundraising goal and help us get one step closer to winning Ohio for Democrats>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36498083/308267749/1855329174?amount=25&refcode=ea.182c1461-ef1e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&mc=ea.182c1461-ef1e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODJjMTQ2MS1lZjFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=an5rfOo95BXj42xWnuuUNkxqr3J_NnfL1RCuykzFLnI=)_** More than anything, we need to connect with voters all across the state and grow our grassroots movement. **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36498112/308267764/1855329174?amount=25&refcode=ea.182c1461-ef1e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&mc=ea.182c1461-ef1e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODJjMTQ2MS1lZjFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=an5rfOo95BXj42xWnuuUNkxqr3J_NnfL1RCuykzFLnI=)**

It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

[**Please make a donation today and join Mayor Cranley's campaign to build an Ohio that works for everyone >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36498113/308267765/-1406512299?refcode=ea.182c1461-ef1e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ms=ea.182c1461-ef1e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&mc=ea.182c1461-ef1e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODJjMTQ2MS1lZjFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=an5rfOo95BXj42xWnuuUNkxqr3J_NnfL1RCuykzFLnI=)

name: John Fetterman
subject: What you do when 90% is gone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
If there’s any lesson to be taken from Braddock, it’s that no community deserves to be abandoned and discarded.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210926-2772-header&t=1&akid=2772%2E434096%2E5TBrZt)
Hi Peter, it's John here.
As we near our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, I want to take a step back and tell you about a project I’m proud of: **A stained glass window in the Braddock Community Center.**
**[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30314?refcode=em20210926-2772&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2772%2E434096%2E5TBrZt)**
Braddock, where I served as Mayor from 2006 to 2019, is home.
To this day, it's where Gisele and I have chosen to raise our family, across the street from Andrew Carnegie's first steel mill. It has also historically been one of the poorest communities in Allegheny county. A community of the 1% — but on the bottom end. The average household income in Braddock is $22,000 — just about two-thirds less than the national average.
When I was mayor, the cost of a NYC brownstone was larger than our entire municipal budget. We weren't working with much, but we made it work.__
[**_That was thirteen years, Peter. And as you keep reading, I hope you'll consider making $13 the amount of your first-ever campaign donation — one dollar for every year that I was Mayor of Braddock, to help define the future of our campaign._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30314?refcode=em20210926-2772&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2772%2E434096%2E5TBrZt)
**The story of Braddock is a lot like the story of our campaign. Because here's what I believe for every municipality in our Commonwealth: No community deserves to be abandoned and discarded.** I will fight for every single community in Pennsylvania if you trust me with your vote, Peter, including yours.
And just like this campaign, our community in Braddock got after it. We put young people to work. We turned abandoned buildings into homes for children leaving foster care. We turned empty lots into urban farms, and resurrected playgrounds and spaces for joy and community.
And one of my proudest moments as Mayor was when we brought this stained glass window into the Braddock Community Center, the first stained glass installed in our community in decades. That moment represented so much of what this campaign stands for — bringing things in, not taking them out.
I have felt what it means to live and work in a community that has lost 90% of everything it once had — population and infrastructure. As Mayor, you see these things up close, and it's incredibly painful. **Success is never guaranteed, but we try all the same.**
I'll shut up now, Peter, but I've got one favor to ask of you before I go:
[**_We're staring down our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline this week, and it would mean the world to me and our campaign if you'd consider making a $13 contribution as your first-ever donation to our campaign, one dollar for every year that I was Mayor of Braddock. $13 or any amount at all will be a big help ahead of our deadline._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30314?refcode=em20210926-2772&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2772%2E434096%2E5TBrZt)
**[Contribute](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30314?refcode=em20210926-2772&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=2772%2E434096%2E5TBrZt)**
Thanks for listening, and see you out there.
In gratitude,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210926-2772-footer&t=6&refcode2=2772_434096_5TBrZt&akid=2772%2E434096%2E5TBrZt)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

clean_body: If there’s any lesson to be taken from Braddock, it’s that no community deserves to be abandoned and discarded. Hi Peter, it's John here. As we near our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, I want to take a step back and tell you about a project I’m proud of: A stained glass window in the Braddock Community Center. Braddock, where I served as Mayor from 2006 to 2019, is home. To this day, it's where Gisele and I have chosen to raise our family, across the street from Andrew Carnegie's first steel mill. It has also historically been one of the poorest communities in Allegheny county. A community of the 1% — but on the bottom end. The average household income in Braddock is $22,000 — just about two-thirds less than the national average. When I was mayor, the cost of a NYC brownstone was larger than our entire municipal budget. We weren't working with much, but we made it work. The story of Braddock is a lot like the story of our campaign. Because here's what I believe for every municipality in our Commonwealth: No community deserves to be abandoned and discarded. I will fight for every single community in Pennsylvania if you trust me with your vote, Peter, including yours. And just like this campaign, our community in Braddock got after it. We put young people to work. We turned abandoned buildings into homes for children leaving foster care. We turned empty lots into urban farms, and resurrected playgrounds and spaces for joy and community. And one of my proudest moments as Mayor was when we brought this stained glass window into the Braddock Community Center, the first stained glass installed in our community in decades. That moment represented so much of what this campaign stands for — bringing things in, not taking them out. I have felt what it means to live and work in a community that has lost 90% of everything it once had — population and infrastructure. As Mayor, you see these things up close, and it's incredibly painful. Success is never guaranteed, but we try all the same. I'll shut up now, Peter, but I've got one favor to ask of you before I go: Thanks for listening, and see you out there. In gratitude, John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zesaogmuiadtj5qbfp448oq98o8u67skc4rq3md0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdjm9oj2chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6u37mfhhg6mme494ljqmscd8m3rkcmjiock3np0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdjm9oj2chh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgaflljlamdjpjsie0uighpqq07kuck9225d3lj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdjm9oj2chh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. subject: My last email only raised $228

body:
This is tough. There’s only four days left until the end of the quarter . . .
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/q1FZqysFUnBcjtZvKDNn1g/oELGj763JKuX86lTJGbOS3VQ)
Patriot,

This is tough.

There’s only four days left until the end of the quarter and my campaign will have to submit our fundraising reports.

The last message I sent out only raised $228 and I’m quickly falling behind my goal. [**Can you chip in now to help?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/q1FZqysFUnBcjtZvKDNn1g/oELGj763JKuX86lTJGbOS3VQ)

| [DONATE NOW](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/q1FZqysFUnBcjtZvKDNn1g/oELGj763JKuX86lTJGbOS3VQ)
---

It’s no fun asking for money all day and I know it probably annoys you as well, **but a grassroots campaign is funded by donors like you[who can chip in whatever amount that you can](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/q1FZqysFUnBcjtZvKDNn1g/oELGj763JKuX86lTJGbOS3VQ)**.

I try my best to make my message to you informative, but I understand that most people don’t have the time to read every message, and sometimes they skip my requests for support.

So far this year, my opponent, incumbent Daniel Webster has raised $204k from just a handful of wealthy donors.

I’m within striking distance, but here’s my real concern: **donors on the Left are going to back him**.

The Florida district that I’m running in is **BRIGHT RED**.

Whoever wins the Republican primary is almost guaranteed to win the general election next November.

**The far Left will do anything to stop me from winning the primary and their only shot is to back my opponent who rarely bothers to even show up and vote in Congress!**

We can win this race, but [**I need you all in**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/LrafXsHiV3ix7WMKJqFaxA/oELGj763JKuX86lTJGbOS3VQ).

[**Help me raise $50,000 in these next four days, and let’s show them that together, we are UNSTOPPABLE!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/q1FZqysFUnBcjtZvKDNn1g/oELGj763JKuX86lTJGbOS3VQ)

Thanks so much for your support.

With respect and gratitude,

Laura Loomer
| [SEND LAURA LOOMER TO WASHINGTON](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/q1FZqysFUnBcjtZvKDNn1g/oELGj763JKuX86lTJGbOS3VQ)

Derek, we're preparing for the first major outdoor event of this campaign -- and you're invited!

**Please join us on Sunday, October 3, for Chris's official campaign kick-off picnic.** It will be at Hamilton Road Park, in Thornburg. You'll get a chance to hear directly from Chris about his vision for western Pennsylvania, the values he'll take with him to Congress, and what we all can do to help him keep a critical swing district in Democratic hands.

We launched our campaign one month ago yesterday. We're already establishing the early organizational infrastructure needed to run in a top-tier race, and Chris is looking forward to meeting as many folks as possible this fall.

We hope you can make it on October 3! Bring friends and family, enjoy the park and some free refreshments, and learn about a bold candidate whose voice we need in Congress.

Looking forward to seeing you there,

Caitlin Handerhan
Campaign Manager
Chris Deluzio for Congress

P.S. Please reach out to me at [caitlin@chrisforpa.com](mailto:caitlin@chrisforpa.com?subject=Re%3A%20Oct.%203%20Campaign%20Kick-Off%20Picnic) if you have any questions about this event. | | | **Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36502043/308280623/1796049497?refcode=EM_C_210926Inv_N_CH_6_G_N_BioBox&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDgwN2JhNi1mYzFlLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EZVruQs4VD5RHgL-B4BP4-ghyLHhRkthAr_gItQmPVY=)****

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: "Get vaccinated or starve"
body:
Peter, **The Biden Administration just announced that all businesses with more than 100 employees will be FORCED to require COVID-19 vaccines for all employees.** In other words, Joe Biden is basically saying: _**" Get the**** ****vaccine or**** ****starve. "** _ **_I 'll be_**** _ _****_clear_**** _ _****_with you; The Center_**** _ _****_for_**** _ _****_American Liberty WILL sue the Biden Administration the second he enforces this outrageous, totalitarian mandate._** [**Will you support the Center for American**** ****Liberty**** ****to help us sue the Biden Administration for this completely unconstitutional vaccine order?** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58410796:J6qeb22NH:m:1:3253819041:0448B0D3D3D3EAB5A7BACD004FD7CC83:r) This isn't an empty threat. _**This is a PROMISE.** _ And the writing has been on the wall for months. First they locked you out of your houses of worship, schools, and closed small businesses... ...then they forced you to wear masks. Now Joe Biden and the rest of his authoritarian minions are going to stop you from making a living and _**feeding your family if you don 't get the COVID vaccine.** _ They don't care about your right to religious freedom... They don't care about your right to medical privacy... They don't care about your right to determine how you should live your life... The only thing that matters to Joe Biden and the radical Left is that you obey. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to help us stop this totalitarian takeover of our lives by sending a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58410796:J6qeb22NH:m:1:3253819041:0448B0D3D3D3EAB5A7BACD004FD7CC83:r) If we don't stand up HERE and NOW it will never end. But we can't do this without you. My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty to push back against these kinds of threats to our civil liberties. And Biden's UNCONSTITUTIONAL order mandating that employers require COVID-19 vaccination is perhaps his worst offense yet. Forget about the astounding hypocrisy. For years they've shouted, "my body, my choice." But it's clear that they only care about "your body" and "your choice" when it fits their political narrative. And if we don't take immediate action against the Biden Administration's new vaccine mandate - your right to make your own medical decisions... your right to individual freedom will disappear overnight. [**That 's why I'm asking you to help us prepare for one of the most important legal battles of our lives with a gift of $35 or more today.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58410796:J6qeb22NH:m:1:3253819041:0448B0D3D3D3EAB5A7BACD004FD7CC83:r) If we don't fight to keep our freedoms today, they'll be gone tomorrow. Thank you in advance for standing with us and for liberty. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58410796:J6qeb22NH:m:1:3253819041:0448B0D3D3D3EAB5A7BACD004FD7CC83:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58410796:J6qeb22NH:m:1:3253819041:0448B0D3D3D3EAB5A7BACD004FD7CC83:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58410796:J6qeb22NH:m:1:3253819041:0448B0D3D3D3EAB5A7BACD004FD7CC83:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.

My Republican opponents love pointing out all of the things that they have a problem within our state. Instead of seeking inspiration from embracing the greatness of our state, **they’ve chosen to use Nevada as a punching bag** to try and get your vote.
_Here’s the deal — I won’t campaign that way and I’m not sorry for it._
I’ve always believed that we should embrace Nevada for what it is and the progress we’ve made. From drastically lowering pandemic unemployment rates to ushering in a public option for health care, **there’s so much we’ve been able to do together.**
Our end-of-quarter goal will be a crucial factor in showing whether or not Nevadans are ready for four more years of progress and unity.

clean_body: Here’s why it matters | | | | | Folks, I’m writing to you about our end-of-quarter goal we have coming up. This is different from our other goals because this is the final push we’ll get before my team has to show how much we’ve raised. So, my team and I created a $30,000 end-of-quarter goal to reach before the end of this month so we can show my five Republican opponents that they’re up against one of the strongest grassroots movements in the country.I know we can hit this goal — but only with your help. | | | | | | | | | | | | | My Republican opponents love pointing out all of the things that they have a problem within our state. Instead of seeking inspiration from embracing the greatness of our state, they’ve chosen to use Nevada as a punching bag to try and get your vote. Here’s the deal — I won’t campaign that way and I’m not sorry for it. I’ve always believed that we should embrace Nevada for what it is and the progress we’ve made. From drastically lowering pandemic unemployment rates to ushering in a public option for health care, there’s so much we’ve been able to do together. Our end-of-quarter goal will be a crucial factor in showing whether or not Nevadans are ready for four more years of progress and unity. | | | | | | | | | | | | As always, I’m grateful to have a team of strong supporters at my side. [**_That’s why I’m asking for your help today. subject: NC-Sen Rating: TOSS UP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
0 African American women | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi5CmjcBWefeG876DYdJ3Eln6IkEwc8Leq2KzDpLA6jsTNEqmZdHDmdagOy_28CkBOd4OuTVtfGwUZPh16RzBKxsnSl9DK9Lxi_rK7MY0gB2yH-XFa8C6tcdkJ3AmSiI6IbIKK0qWflJ-eN1z_rs5OUz7cB-dtISEouUP7I7kSDCxQU15fL3df8Nv2JSJi1T9M-CRrXVRwh_rfIEk3X_VFfiwkrKUS7OKVTBgFxZH8ZoxO_YoLY40S1kKe1yihaL-JG_DDnYNsIA_8TvPqQ8vVQ1kQO7NwVMyHoGZ3cHg6fw4/3fn/PSnbdE6NTDSO17nSKjiVoQ/h0/DQ0Ep9bXa1aXlCRYpLXt8RYXA1uoKjqP-k5mxZon5Rc)
Derek,

I’m running for North Carolina’s open Senate seat — one of the most competitive races for 2022.

That’s no exaggeration. _The Cook Political Report_ , a top nonpartisan elections forecaster, ranked North Carolina as one of only three toss-up races in the entire country.

That means this is a critical race in Democrats’ fight to hold the Senate majority. To pull it off, we’re counting on lots of grassroots support.

[**Can you split a $15 donation between our grassroots campaign to flip North Carolina and Common Good VA? We can deliver real change for working people and winning this race could decide the Senate majority!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi5CmjcBWefeG876DYdJ3Elop7yyE60vEyOcXThNdMhAo2G2VtUKjnZciavCNkkdokZiye4T_Ggew6VOVnCcbY-v4K-VFstQNkZHb0nCGyfsfFPkc2RioxAmcfOPmDUEDvJfLazNBF_eO56TNRiuhFAzcxMU3rNyxAHft-OQHmlmne3iwN3Ih5FjfUZtuPjijIWWnCNvGHPTyMlUFwZsZtqAEIeJeS4df-EMxxyE9V3g3s-O9E10mvNlE2lOPfA7U4TsaofSGfzQOiqynQfRkz0S8w7iA9blZ2ksbdhX6MrHrodsUk1dbVCZIVJSXwVPg8/3fn/PSnbdE6NTDSO17nSKjiVoQ/h1/2sa74mvp2Nf_8j60OJ-rZ5iFFr4Qn8brKOTO2yGXxMc)

Look, Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell and their allies are all doing whatever it takes to keep this seat for themselves and their interests. They will spend and say anything that it takes to stop Democrats from making progress on the issues that matter most.

Bottom line: our campaign is one of Democrats’ best chances to expand the Senate majority, and I know what it takes to win.

In 2019, I had the honor of making history as the first African American woman to serve as Chief Justice of North Carolina’s Supreme Court, and I’m the only African American woman running for Senate anywhere in the country with a record of winning statewide. And I’ve done it twice — more than anyone else in this race.

We can turn North Carolina blue in 2022, but I cannot do it alone.

[**Please consider making a $15 donation to our campaign right now. Winning a competitive race like this requires each of us to do our part.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi5CmjcBWefeG876DYdJ3Elop7yyE60vEyOcXThNdMhAo2G2VtUKjnZciavCNkkdok9FviiJjmXkSTsS7Gk--7LXVZwzOJUUAdyyplixTD-B6BRodfpMBJgq9vqm7YfRvAVp5N5PSCaLt0JVuKr2LKAnx01OnaHRgTURr48tg-DnhCwIC1sAx5QzQA6irLQyuvts5drHlCCyEfj_7fOr_1tykSereTjkZ2ArvGLgkytYDSpr-LuYFb4w6vf6HfwJojH4qE4WQMBqn7IdE5Ic3gU0i4i7UL1HNIlp5mUI_5T5fz83QSLQlug3IhbQkfD2vo/3fn/PSnbdE6NTDSO17nSKjiVoQ/h2/zDL47eLehRN46NQvS8TZR_NXyO7LkfkU3E_fS7-nDR0)

There’s no doubt this will be a tough race, but this is our opportunity to make real progress together.

Cheri Beasley

body:
When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since winning.

Friends -

In just a moment, I am going to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign for the U.S. Senate and Tom O’Halleran. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.

Here is the truth:

When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since taking office.

Now, that approach doesn’t make everyone happy. And we just learned of yet another right-wing dark money group running ads targeting me in Arizona.

So with our end-of-month deadline coming up, I am asking you to contribute $10 to help me fight back.

It all adds up, and that’s how we win: together.
