name: Michael Toppen, Finance Director
subject: Here's the plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
A message from Team Engel's Finance Director
---
Hello friend,
I’ll be honest, it’s been a brutal quarter. It seems we can’t go a day without hearing tragic news like the Superme Court erroding abortion rights or the continuing saga of the Trump-backed Arizona Fraudit. It's been disheartening to say the least.

**But we have to keep fighting. This race is too important.**

Control of Congress hangs in the balance, which is why Republican groups are already spending millions in Arizona.

Our finance plan ensures we'll have the resources needed to fight back against the coming onslaught of Republican money. **But we're still about $15,000 short of where we need to be by next Thursday's FEC deadline.** If we're going to have the resources available when we need them most, we can't fall short of this deadline.

So how do we reach this goal? Well, the maximum contribution allowed by law is $2,900. Five generous donors making contributions of that size would get us pretty close!
.
..
...
....
.....
.............

No, huh? Yeah, I didn't think so. But I'm the finance guy -- it's my job to ask.

[**I'll make it easy -- give what you can. Whether it's $2,900 or $29, every bit gets us closer to our goal, and closer to having the resources necessary to win this race. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36505690/308293807/41694283?refcode=X_092621_EOQ_C&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTllZTdiNi0wYzFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z-tGuUDKRn6TOpaZ9axzO8evlK9QxCXlEv_sSEE1eZA=)

name: Jim DeMint
subject: A Movement For America
body:
Here at CPI, our mission is to fight back against those who want to divide our country and erase the principles [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c458%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=K%2biYl1myfH5Ozks%2fAZG%2bmw&sysid=1)
| |
---
|
---
Fellow Patriot:

Here at CPI, our mission is to fight back against those who want to divide our country and erase the principles and values that have made America the greatest nation in history.

We're taking action by providing resources, facilities, and staff that conservatives have never had before.

What we're building is much more than just a home for conservatism in DC. We're building a movement for what is right all across the country. It's a movement for America.

The need has never been greater. The time to act is now.

**[Please watch our new video explaining CPI's mission and share it with your family and friends.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66632%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DiDXOkvjLY9xcexaZcJoYg&sysid=1)**

Together, we can train, equip, and unite conservatives in the fight for America's future.

For Freedom,
Jim DeMint
CPI Chairman
|

|

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our natio
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zst9sjku3kntiq3ju7dkuhi45cc9i4h76j8n87o0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdie0o32cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z8rv1edr2cod7idjp1qkn6jarp4a00qrm0ndkc0g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdie0o32cph2bs)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I 've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zpa1bgkecfl9ov25545fp8016n7t4aereqk87h4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cdie0o32cph2bs)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

| This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central
MATERIAL CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: You should assume that the sender of this email has an affiliate relationship and/or another material connection to the persons or businesses mentioned in this message and may receive commissions from purchases you make on subsequent web sites. You should not rely solely on information contained in this email to evaluate the product or service being endorsed. Always exercise due diligence before purchasing any product or service.

name: Cooper for North Carolina
subject: Texas, Florida, Georgia...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36506200/308295272/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTFiZDI1ZC0wZTFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BL_5wc25-ULZtNTVyykpr9vHhr_QkIsXErtr0uplyJ0=&emci=27660419-ef1e-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=a51bd25d-0e1f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=1049176)
**We know what happens when Republicans control state governments, Peter.** From voting access to reproductive freedom, in recent months, states including Georgia, Florida, and Texas have seen radical right-wingers go after our most basic rights.**All the while, communities across the country face real issues — climate change, skyrocketing health care costs, a lingering pandemic — that Republicans would rather brush aside.** Here in North Carolina, we can count on Roy Cooper to defend partisan attacks on critical issues like these and actually _tackle_ the problems facing us. Roy is hard at work for North Carolinians, but he needs our support. **[Our September online fundraising deadline is just around the corner — 11:59 pm on 9/30, to be exact — and we set a $15,000 target. Rush a donation immediately to help close the gap>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36506201/308295273/206475156?refcode=em_RC_FR_EOQ2_092621_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTFiZDI1ZC0wZTFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BL_5wc25-ULZtNTVyykpr9vHhr_QkIsXErtr0uplyJ0=)** Peter, it’s clear that the Supreme Court has no interest in upholding so many of the protections we count on. I'll be blunt: **With each passing day, it becomes clearer that Republicans are unfit to govern.**

\-- They pushed our democracy to the brink with their lies about the 2020 election.
\-- They have attacked our voting rights for their own political benefit.
\-- And now, they're demanding complete loyalty to Donald Trump and his destructive politics as they fight to defeat our Majority.

It's sickening.

But I'm more fired up than ever before to defend my House Democrats and safeguard our progress.

And with the GOP playing dirty, I know it's going to take everything we've got to protect our House Majority.

**That 's why I've set an ambitious $400,000 End of Quarter fundraising goal for my House Democrats -- and I'm counting on your help to meet it before time runs out in just 96 hours.**

**So please, can you rush in $3, $10, $25 -- or whatever you can afford -- to help me crush my End of Quarter goal and defend our House Majority?**

Today is World Contraception Day -- an annual celebration of birth control and family planning.
#
Today is World Contraception Day -- an annual celebration of birth control and family planning.
It’s just common sense, Peter: contraception empowers millions of women to make their own decisions about their reproductive and sexual health. And it reduces unwanted pregnancies and can decrease the transmission of sexually transmitted infections.
**Senator Murray has been a steadfast champion in the fight for our reproductive rights -- from free birth control and affordable health care to the right to abortion.**

Today is World Contraception Day -- an annual celebration of birth control and family planning. It’s just common sense, Peter: contraception empowers millions of women to make their own decisions about their reproductive and sexual health. And it reduces unwanted pregnancies and can decrease the transmission of sexually transmitted infections. Senator Murray has been a steadfast champion in the fight for our reproductive rights -- from free birth control and affordable health care to the right to abortion. As extreme Republicans across the country launch dangerous attacks on reproductive rights, it’s more important than ever that we defend and protect the right for everyone to make their own decisions about pregnancy and parenting. Patty Murray and Senate Democrats are standing strong in the fight -- but we need your support, too. Thank you, Team Patty As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. * PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Team AOC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Here’s the goal that we need to hit between now and Thursday at midnight.
There’s only _five_ end-of-quarter deadlines between now and Alexandria’s re-election next year. One of those five deadlines is just four days away.
At each of these milestones, our campaign submits everything we’ve raised to the Federal Election Commission for the public to see. Our fundraising strength in each of these reports is how our opponents, reporters, and even members of our own party judge the momentum of our movement for bold, transformative change.
**We’ve looked at the numbers, and we need to raise $1.7 million for the quarter to stay on track and prepare for what we know will be an extremely expensive race to keep Alexandria in Congress.** Whoever wins the Republican primary will have the full support of the GOP, special interests, and corporate PACs bankrolling their campaign.
[We’re hoping for a big response today so we’re in the best position to meet our goal by Thursday. If you’re able, can you chip in $3 – or anything you can – to support Alexandria on this public report? ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210926-2?refcode=em20210926-2528-P_FND_EOQ_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=2528_2526796_KTyXEp&akid=2528%2E2526796%2EKTyXEp)
Here's where we're at:
**Goal:** | **Left to raise:** | **Suggested donation:**
---|---|---
$1.7 million | $230,833 | [$3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210926-2?refcode=em20210926-2528-P_FND_EOQ_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2528_2526796_KTyXEp&akid=2528%2E2526796%2EKTyXEp)
This report is not only a signal of our movement’s strength – it could also determine what our race looks like in 2022. The truth is that some prospective candidates are deciding right now whether it's worth jumping into the race to challenge Alexandria in 2022.
These potential opponents will be looking at this report to decide whether they have a shot – and the stronger our report is, the more likely we can thin out the field.
Our opponents are looking for any vulnerabilities in our campaign. If we can show a surge in grassroots donations of $5, $15, or $50 from grassroots supporters across the country – it speaks volumes.
[Can we count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you can right now to help post the strongest FEC report possible?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210926-2?refcode=em20210926-2528-P_FND_EOQ_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2528_2526796_KTyXEp&akid=2528%2E2526796%2EKTyXEp)
Our campaign is funded by all of you and we’re so grateful for your support.
With thanks,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210926-2?refcode=em20210926-2528-P_FND_EOQ_OPP&t=4&refcode2=2528_2526796_KTyXEp&akid=2528%2E2526796%2EKTyXEp)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210926-2528-P_FND_EOQ_OPP&t=5&akid=2528%2E2526796%2EKTyXEp)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=2528%2E2526796%2EKTyXEp) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=2528%2E2526796%2EKTyXEp) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=2528%2E2526796%2EKTyXEp)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

clean_body: I am ready to make my district and country proud. Your support is NECESSARY to make this possible. | | | | | | Newsflash If you haven’t seen our big news break yet, here’s your chance. I was interviewed by OANN and the recipient of the Lifetime Achievement from the H.E.R Lead Network. We need your support to make the impossible now possible! ...I am excited and I want to make us all proud.... We are extremely honored, and look forward to serving Ohio's Congressional District 11. body:
| **FIRST:** Republicans introduced SWEEPING voting suppression bills in nearly EVERY state.

**THEN:** The far-right LIED about H.R. 1 and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act because they want to rig our elections. **_NOT ON OUR WATCH!_**

**NOW: We’re counting on 800 Democrats to fight back by signing on to our voting rights petition.** **[SIGN ON NOW TO SUPPORT THE JOHN LEWIS VOTING RIGHTS ACT »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36507624/308298821/-22420397?refcode=UD_20210926_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxNDkyN2YwLTE0MWYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8u_0T2DaC_hJDluiOu9p18o5VnBR2LwCgw7PMyaN89s=&emci=1cbe29f7-4a1d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=814927f0-141f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=4584036)** | [800 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: SIGN ON NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36507625/308298822/-22420397?refcode=UD_20210926_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxNDkyN2YwLTE0MWYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8u_0T2DaC_hJDluiOu9p18o5VnBR2LwCgw7PMyaN89s=&emci=1cbe29f7-4a1d-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=814927f0-141f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=4584036)

name: American Update
subject: Be one of the first
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8727%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=L68s3Z7O9Z6GlLTAFiblzQ&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04160%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jBeIxzAD%2fxAPWvJ9bycRPw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04160%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jBeIxzAD%2fxAPWvJ9bycRPw&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04161%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2br4Yd7OtADuvRg%2bAUJMLWw&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

body:
On Thursday, campaigns across the country will be filing their end-of-quarter reports. That means we have less than a week to make sure Democrats in competitive races have the strongest possible fundraising results -- including former U.S. Navy pilot Mark Kelly in Arizona.
#
Peter,
On Thursday, campaigns across the country will be filing their end-of-quarter reports. That means we have less than a week to make sure Democrats in competitive races have the strongest possible fundraising results -- including former U.S. Navy pilot Mark Kelly in Arizona.
Senator Kelly narrowly flipped this red seat blue in the last election -- and we’re going to have to beat those long odds again this November to keep the Senator Arizona deserves in Washington.
There is so much on the line in the Senate -- and right now, the GOP are threatening to “dine and dash” on their debt and shut down the government as soon as next week.
**If you’ve been waiting for the right time to chip in -- this is it, Peter:**

I am extending an invitation to become a member of our donor wall with ANY contribution to help us reach our End of Quarter goal. If we can get 25 donors to chip in, we will put immense pressure on the Radical Left. | President Trump Endorsed my campaign to be the next Senator from North Carolina because he knows I will revive the America First agenda and do what it takes to accomplish those ideas in Washington. With only three days left until our deadline, we have no time to waste. If you are able to contribute, what are you waiting for? The Socialist Democrats are putting ALL the resources they have into the Senate race in North Carolina in 2022, but with your support we can stop them because the people are on our side. Thank you for taking the time to read this. Sincerely, Ted Budd TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

clean_body: This has been a rough week | | | = | | I won’t sugar coat it -- it’s been a rough week for my friend Terry McAuliffe, Derek. A recent poll showed Terry behind. It's the second recent poll that shows Terry's Trump-endorsed opponent with a real shot to win. And now The Cook Political Report has downgraded Terry's chances of winning. The good news is that Terry's campaign is about to hit a huge milestone. Look, it would mean a lot to me and Terry to reach $2 million raised online in September, Derek. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Mark Warner = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. But I just checked in with them and I knew I had to reach out immediately.

_They told me I only need[**1 more gift**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36509141/308303205/1129282168?refcode=20210926_em_fr_b2_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDg2ZDA1Yi0xYjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uEcAC2tr6AXFFESpFoQoppDA8HtPsbNnGCRIJlcGcVw=) from 18326 to hit my End-of-Week Goal!_

Unlike many political candidates, I’ve experienced the struggles that hardworking Americans face everyday.

I grew up in poverty. And I know the feeling of living paycheck to paycheck, without any sort of safety net to rely on.

So when Congressman Don Bacon voted to cut taxes for billionaires and big corporations instead of helping hardworking families, I knew I needed to replace him.

[**But the fact is: running for office is incredibly expensive.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36509143/308303207/1129282168?refcode=20210926_em_fr_b2_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDg2ZDA1Yi0xYjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uEcAC2tr6AXFFESpFoQoppDA8HtPsbNnGCRIJlcGcVw=)

And I can’t personally fund my own campaign.

[**_I know we need more everyday people representing and fighting for us in Congress -- and I’m running to do just that. But I need to stay on track and reach my End-of-Week Goal before midnight, or I’ll be forced to make serious budget cuts. I can make it if one more supporter from 18326 chips in, so I’m humbly asking:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36509144/308303208/1129282168?refcode=20210926_em_fr_b2_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDg2ZDA1Yi0xYjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uEcAC2tr6AXFFESpFoQoppDA8HtPsbNnGCRIJlcGcVw=) [**Can I count on your $10?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36509145/308303209/1129282168?refcode=20210926_em_fr_b2_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDg2ZDA1Yi0xYjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uEcAC2tr6AXFFESpFoQoppDA8HtPsbNnGCRIJlcGcVw=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36509146/308303210/1129282168?refcode=20210926_em_fr_b2_tv_30op_rs&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDg2ZDA1Yi0xYjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uEcAC2tr6AXFFESpFoQoppDA8HtPsbNnGCRIJlcGcVw=)

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | | Look -- there’s a lot we don’t agree with Liz Cheney on, but she’s right: Liz Cheney was named as Vice Chair of the January 6 Select Committee because she is determined to ensure that the American people have access to the truth of January 6. | | | We appreciate your response! \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: RACE UPDATE via Team Ryan
subject: This can’t wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1000%2E3611125%2EpyYuD8 ][IMG]

Team,

Summer might be over but our race is a dead heat.

+------------------+
| OHIO SENATE POLL |
| |
| Tim Ryan: 37% |
| JD Vance: 36% |
+------------------+

We knew the fight for this open seat wouldn’t be easy, but recent polling
shows this race is too close for comfort.

With our FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline just days away, we need
everyone to step up and pitch in. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4577?t=1007&akid=1000%2E3611125%2EpyYuD8 ]Can you rush a donation of $25 or
more right now?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4577?t=1008&akid=1000%2E3611125%2EpyYuD8 ]Rush a donation >>

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Folks, this isn’t just horse race politics, there’s a lot at stake here:
bringing good-paying jobs back to Ohio, investing in our children’s
education, making the economy work for working people, and much, much
more.

We know millionaire Republicans like JD Vance don’t have everyday Ohioans’
best interests in mind -- they only care about their rich friends and
pleasing Donald Trump.

Not Tim -- like millions of Ohioans, he's got a mortgage and student loans
to pay. He’ll fight with everything he’s got for you and your family.

But national Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into Ohio to make
sure this battleground seat stays red. That’s why we’ve got to reach our
$100,000 FEC fundraising goal before the end of the month -- we can’t
afford to come up short.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4577?t=1009&akid=1000%2E3611125%2EpyYuD8 ]Can we count on you to chip in and help Tim expand his razor-thin lead
to flip this seat blue?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4577?t=1010&akid=1000%2E3611125%2EpyYuD8 ]Donate $25

We can’t do this without you!

-- Team Ryan

name: Ready for Stacey
subject: ATLANTA JOURNAL-CONSTITUTION: "Abrams might sit the race out."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, GOP Gov. Brian Kemp just deployed his strategists to form a new group called Stop Stacey. They're using their deep political back channels throughout Georgia to keep Stacey Abrams from unseating Kemp in 2022. **ATLANTA JOURNAL-CONSTITUTION: "Abrams might sit the race out."** Last week Stacey Abrams flew to Texas, kicking off her nationwide tour firing up progressives ahead of next year's midterms. Meanwhile, Kemp's Stop Stacey operatives are hard at work securing big-dollar donations in Georgia to make sure Stacey's grassroots network can't compete with Kemp's machine in 2022. Stacey is the ONLY candidate capable of defeating Kemp & Co's fascist agenda to undermine our democracy with their authoritarian scheme. We have to protect her at all costs \-- and prove that progressives everywhere stand with Stacey. | **[STAND WITH STACEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36509736/308304928/103943381?refcode=OUT_20210926_GEN_FDR_H&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4ODU2MDdhLTFkMWYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Pw858uNAEuehU5vb3VoxcZo5G0c8lkVivMW0lUwSRyg=)**
---

Stacey Abrams is smart, Peter \-- she will only put herself in front of the “GOP battering ram” if she knows her campaign is viable. It's a shame that so many of the Democrats who sung her praises for helping beat back Mitch McConnell in 2020 stopped supporting Stacey as soon as the going got tough.

That's why we're reaching out to you directly. You are among our top 300 most dedicated supporters \-- you've stepped up every time we needed you most. Stacey needs you now, Peter. Will you join us one more time and fight for the only candidate strong enough to defeat the GOP's plot to curb voting rights and undermine our democracy?

**[RUN STACEY, RUN!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36509737/308304929/103943381?refcode=OUT_20210926_GEN_FDR_H&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4ODU2MDdhLTFkMWYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Pw858uNAEuehU5vb3VoxcZo5G0c8lkVivMW0lUwSRyg=)**
---

**[We've got to act fast, Peter. If our grassroots network keeps sitting on the sidelines, Stacey will never have the tools she needs to take on Brian Kemp \-- and that means our larger movement to defend our democracy from GOP attacks will take a serious hit. We need you to chip in right now, Peter, because whether you can spare $5, $10, $25, or even more, you will send Stacey a clear and direct message that there is an entire country of supporters ready to fight for her on day one. Please, Peter, take a second to rush in a donation by midnight tonight.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36509738/308304930/103943381?refcode=OUT_20210926_GEN_FDR_H&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk4ODU2MDdhLTFkMWYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Pw858uNAEuehU5vb3VoxcZo5G0c8lkVivMW0lUwSRyg=)**

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Update on our environment for you
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

For decades, Florida’s leaders have ignored environmental crises and failed to take bold action on climate change.

When I’m Governor, that will change. And as Commissioner of Agriculture, I’m already taking action.

I grew up in South Florida and understood the beauty and importance of the Everglades from an early age. Last week, I once again stood against building a highway through Everglades wetlands, even as Ron DeSantis and the rest of Florida’s Republican cabinet voted to advance the project

Additionally, we took the first step towards eliminating styrofoam food packaging in Florida. In doing so, we’ll help remove harmful packaging that takes more than 500 years to decompose and takes up roughly 30% of our landfills.

I can’t emphasize this enough: securing our future means protecting our environment. We’re running out of time to address climate change, and protecting our water, parks, and beaches now will benefit our economy and keep Floridians safe.

Over the past two decades, Florida’s Republican Governors have ignored climate change and refused to step up in the face of environmental crises. If you agree it’s time to break the system and elect a Governor who will fight for our environment, please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-enviro-sept?refcode=925]

I’ll be blunt, friends. Florida’s environment can’t afford another four years of Ron DeSantis. There’s just too much at stake when it comes to our health, our economy, and our future.

Winning this race is critical to securing our future. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll step up with a contribution today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-enviro-sept?refcode=925]

Thanks for standing with us,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Val Demings
subject: please, Derek, I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
from the very beginning to help me defeat Marco Rubio. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIeLkiAIAN0WQ1Zrg_1-e_6xV71uKbEr-8aZXBX8xerDHcadTXl7rYpvPeEDYBOTNIjIJFQI71ZatH-qbuH7Iyy0KXrt9mOevCUg8KEHLk-UI3NC7QGFSKOb6_EOaRmGXuC3jRPdMYDsXKK0QVg1kyS2Mw6EPdztpTOQ2UQOXKeLZDIIdwsj88BYt5RfDiB99Z86bq-hFLS8dK0KQHFEXN4_0iF-kRGh1b6hk4EhZJnqm9dhhF5TQkbY0CszJKKiZSYJ0CeDqT__vdaGZO9NN_8HZj1Dne3mZwo0i-nIKiDibHfvScLTN-KPsQO5yBNr-Jg/3fn/_yC11_eLTG-qzw63nE3h6w/h0/czFYQOBxOIg1vmmrT6L5JUSiMnKq39wXDtQnLFVfcj8)
Derek,

I recently announced I'm running for the U.S. Senate against Marco Rubio. CNN is already calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip – **and with Senate control on the line, everybody from Mitch McConnell to Donald Trump to far-right outside groups will do whatever it takes to defeat me.**

That's why I'm making an important ask of you – one that will determine whether our campaign comes out of the gate as strong as possible: **[will you become a Founding Donor to this campaign by splitting a contribution of $20 or more between my campaign and Common Good VA today? Every dollar you give will ensure we have the resources, from the very beginning, to defeat Marco Rubio and flip Florida blue.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIeLkiAIAN0WQ1Zrg_1-e_6w342rITUr1pei0ZiWFJxxzj5_VHSMCrh2EwivYutLats0paO8OWdauf23sq9AdFnjcCDQkMx5UehsV48nZ-i6RnNqSPGkdliThRXJShDcrhin61SfHa3J4jghxNJErqAnJkpUnaoVy3eTn8LcJsGjFDOQTEMQG-uHADOlqzJ3PV--mQvH8yb3CYf2uFvP2fBP6O6dVREURAKgBp1ubqbbpvf-PAmkYH1jHDXDGw_hmCkoR6T-0s0ptlEUP0INGBU4XgbLX0UiC_WxHsuhKQnglKibunDZ64YcZzrsBnYCQLA/3fn/_yC11_eLTG-qzw63nE3h6w/h1/t3ai2nMQpWB4Hus9ZHrzZ94xrNStOAtbqBeu2zCGrhk)**

There's no need to beat around the bush, Derek: defeating Marco Rubio is going to be tough. He will have tens of millions of dollars in right-wing, special-interest money on his side. The GOP will attack me relentlessly to keep this seat red, because Senate control could come down to what we do in Florida. **[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIeLkiAIAN0WQ1Zrg_1-e_6wpNrDWwDkmuLwHedbXIl4wW9K5WX5kM-QuYchrZxWchZQm1pAPd45U7sjxb-XOYwITaSexIbOsWF1e6Ay_CF7chelZ6KbH11P2Q6Xa6RERZ3goK61nHS7z815pIXZDw8VgAtJjEAcSProYxaKoLSTolnUZFriVf-EgrhTID9KRTgfX2ragtqUosSdWUqeRvarUklcyOm7r2dM38NoO4rEZFxEhWvROdKxKrhOfEr-51bMDroyy3cbH-vZHaOpt9VBwXEaU2bnAF7AxFkLKCB9hRX3PhsSqV9qNWNMqNs4LGA/3fn/_yC11_eLTG-qzw63nE3h6w/h2/zN-mjZn5OIJ5KE6jVanGm3_l7TM0GHZnIyVMkaMdqrk)** **Keep this number in mind: 10,033.** That's the number of votes that decided Florida's last Senate race – a margin of just two-tenths of a percentage point. That's about as slim as margins come, so I need you to hear me when I say this: Our ability to register and mobilize voters – our ability to _win_ – hinges on the resources we're able to build up from day one.

It's how we won in Georgia and took back the Senate. It's how Joe Biden and Kamala Harris won the White House. And it's how we'll flip Florida blue and protect our majorities in Congress so we can continue delivering the bold agenda that the American people deserve.

**I need you with me, Derek. I need you from the very beginning – as a Founding Donor – to help me defeat Marco Rubio. Will you step up and join us now?[Split a donation of $20 or more between my campaign and Common Good VA to become a Founding Donor right now so we can flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIeLkiAIAN0WQ1Zrg_1-e_6w12dCXk0YNU5pavHCPXXjsmx6NBs8kdVQQbXByKY88I9330vqOnFycpg4i7h3LEd2GlRCA3mgqicpJRlUd2CCvKmKnrhIhjps7uzvbdXq5GRe-P59vWF14S_Tfoqpv9BCxYrusz4xaJWdY3BXTtfajtIbMDBe57B2tJLUBznnPNfBiN-QBNYnu4meDpUv3dRweEIGtOjbNMbKSu1_XmltCZH03aUHOkqIMynQ_PN95SjMxzPIWWogSDtJZDT2Ti2DYGZ3ycoNe46rvCnXQGGQm3ZeUzIuACEkjJ6NOORhgcw/3fn/_yC11_eLTG-qzw63nE3h6w/h3/A8B1dlAWzhUKjgqgzyKbXQ7DLB3z9Z2ggO2aog4Lxr8)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIW28-oMIv8S5ulMA_7UXGCJiVoasYqmN5goTex3lV--3Nm2mkzC05QxQycp6BZI0qlhTMgRNnEvTeD4ly2Sd3TGTP9tAKq_ub1Kz81_3TLa5jcaOMi5jtvFJV25xnS0NF6wbOZ7PZCHCt91SeQpg3LppUJI5Rh20MJIqVH15c9iGdwWFhQtwiaL71Mb19RNbDVDiL0E-nuGYksJSwS_9xXR5WBlHWNZQmw4_qRyJeFaViVPyCxbKjYI0Y0KE334M8qCKtG3wNQ7ltGgy97Cw0geRuU522we8Kek5oPmIlCguFta32JmFR1O9mAKV7l7j0REBkpAk-i0Xr6DWAHbnZP4/3fn/_yC11_eLTG-qzw63nE3h6w/h4/fz73zkLT2PdSDcQJfvzr1PKyh_BKXRNpNGHbG0_rQgA)

clean_body: from the very beginning to help me defeat Marco Rubio. | | | Derek, I recently announced I'm running for the U.S. Senate against Marco Rubio. CNN is already calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip – and with Senate control on the line, everybody from Mitch McConnell to Donald Trump to far-right outside groups will do whatever it takes to defeat me. That's why I'm making an important ask of you – one that will determine whether our campaign comes out of the gate as strong as possible: There's no need to beat around the bush, Derek: defeating Marco Rubio is going to be tough. He will have tens of millions of dollars in right-wing, special-interest money on his side. The GOP will attack me relentlessly to keep this seat red, because Senate control could come down to what we do in Florida. Keep this number in mind: 10,033. That's the number of votes that decided Florida's last Senate race – a margin of just two-tenths of a percentage point. That's about as slim as margins come, so I need you to hear me when I say this: Our ability to register and mobilize voters – our ability to win – hinges on the resources we're able to build up from day one. It's how we won in Georgia and took back the Senate. It's how Joe Biden and Kamala Harris won the White House. And it's how we'll flip Florida blue and protect our majorities in Congress so we can continue delivering the bold agenda that the American people deserve. I need you with me, Derek. I need you from the very beginning – as a Founding Donor – to help me defeat Marco Rubio. Will you step up and join us now? Thank you, Congresswoman Val Demings | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . body:
| **

Constitution allows Biden to mandate COVID vaccine. Federal government can do even more.**

* * *

Listen, we're trusting you to tell us the truth...

As you can see in the headline above, the liberal media outlets are pressuring for MORE vaccine mandates and we need to know if you think they're right.

| _The liberal media says_ the Constitution allows Joe Biden to impose a vaccination mandate on all airline travelers in the United States.

**Do you agree?**

[** ****No, it's an abuse of power ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6a89e3e551de4a9caa344ab3868f060d&_e=_osVns_5fz4E2HrlBRQHi7-DZNh5YguDojjn7kMpTL6b9u2P68jRWumy0dnQW9ds0s9beTuYHPmsn2FUHYSdMBnXvVeta0Bv5qvEx7-lmVvwB2en5SkOL91hocBNZmm9JTFUVQTUBJXrDilmbTO0eGKkHUk887ln2Lc2ywYu3JXeTaeZv8xmkEgLDUC6pu_FCRcA2PVp43eDv3-uedFvFf_m8wiaaqcS6kb4UF9qDQPH6M-qBC1ezt1xUYOORiMt1o3qvy83sWyFAp6W2owlYr9Ab3DEwEpH2ffHqa85NuQLkcxeHEhm_kg6ic35Ej1Z3srQWMIUs682l_juHoHdulnJAivsHRLDaInP2TfzS6YmReobjsqy-9LswbsAD1pXMleG4S7x0dKuTyEyJZCvwJrV7ST_sWBH0rzQBpN9V8rCW-schc5FrWFNQDfpTIDcoQ_mX4xiS4fTbyTwvfDN9hUZYIKqlhi0swFMOxUeFG8%3D)

[** ****Yes, I want him to ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6a89e3e551de4a9caa344ab3868f060d&_e=_osVns_5fz4E2HrlBRQHi7-DZNh5YguDojjn7kMpTL6b9u2P68jRWumy0dnQW9ds0s9beTuYHPmsn2FUHYSdMBnXvVeta0Bv5qvEx7-lmVvwB2en5SkOL91hocBNZmm9JTFUVQTUBJXrDilmbTO0eGKkHUk887ln2Lc2ywYu3JXeTaeZv8xmkEgLDUC6pu_FCRcA2PVp43eDv3-uedFvFf_m8wiaaqcS6kb4UF9qDQPH6M-qBC1ezt1xUYOORiMt1o3qvy83sWyFAp6W2owlYrVrlNGGxLQlShrRU-SNTTIy-z2GImQAkR0qV1HfAVQFDa1PQ579KQiAApp0aW5xYsJM5w7Fy4G90Zwd6f0dStNFGT5qpjfTsDBFNNjx7OKeBGjUwv5t036sfMOopFqBY5EFlZeKEGxyisF372i8kadSIBI6PA_ITDryyf8M7v0UE-Qhbu49Be_qza_6rAG0vwjDVqPLdSwSSL734XmzVGs%3D)

Educators and allies, Thank you! Because of your support, our ads to boost Debra Gardner are running right now in her critical election in Virginia. We’re blanketing the district, educating voters about Debra and her track record of leadership and public service. **If you haven’t already given, we’re asking you to join the effort:[_Your contribution today will help us reach all the voters we need to reach._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36512098/308321509/814174363?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210926DGads_EEE_180DO_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4YTJmZTI0LTJiMWYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hCmKBIaRV080nHm-3eurwXeuU4BWV7e8p9WzgWUUeZI=)** **** | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36512099/308321510/814174363?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210926DGads_EEE_180DO_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4YTJmZTI0LTJiMWYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hCmKBIaRV080nHm-3eurwXeuU4BWV7e8p9WzgWUUeZI=)
---
There are about 60,000 potential voters in this election, and tens of thousands of them are parents, current educators and retired educators themselves. This is a place where most people value their public schools and appreciate their educators.
But with everything going on these days, so many potential voters are just starting to pay attention and learn about the candidates. That’s why it’s critical that we reach them today and help Debra tell her story.
[_**That’s why we’re asking for your help to run these ads even more often and reach even more voters.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36512100/308321511/814174363?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210926DGads_EEE_180DO_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4YTJmZTI0LTJiMWYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hCmKBIaRV080nHm-3eurwXeuU4BWV7e8p9WzgWUUeZI=)
We know this race is winnable, but it’s going to be close:
* Four years ago, the district was decided by just 128 votes.
* Two years ago, the district was decided by just 189 votes.
* This year, Debra has outraised and outhustled her Republican opponent.

But we’re struggling to keep up with the Koch Brothers support for Debra’s opponent. They’ve already dumped over $140,000 into defeating Debra, and this is our best chance to fight back and get voters the truth.
[_**Make your donation of $10, $20 or more today to make a direct impact >>**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36512101/308321512/814174363?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210926DGads_EEE_180DO_xx_l3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4YTJmZTI0LTJiMWYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hCmKBIaRV080nHm-3eurwXeuU4BWV7e8p9WzgWUUeZI=)

Educators around the country are watching these elections in Virginia to see if it’s safe to run for office and if they’ll have the support they need to win. If the far right can defeat educators like Debra, it’s going to be harder to encourage great teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and education support professionals to stand for public office. And that means we all lose.
**But with your support, we can show educators that we have their backs and show them that they too can have a fair shot at winning in 2022.**

We’re blanketing the district, educating voters about Debra and her track record of leadership and public service. | = Educators and allies, Thank you! Because of your support, our ads to boost Debra Gardner are running right now in her critical election in Virginia. We’re blanketing the district, educating voters about Debra and her track record of leadership and public service. If you haven’t already given, we’re asking you to join the effort:= ** | = There are about 60,000 potential voters in this election, and tens of thousands of them are parents, current educators and retired educators themselves. This is a place where most people value their public schools and appreciate their educators. But with everything going on these days, so many potential voters are just starting to pay attention and learn about the candidates. That’s why it’s critical that we reach them today and help Debra tell her story. = We know this race is winnable, but it’s going to be close: Four years ago, the district was decided by just 128 votes. Two years ago, the district was decided by just 189 votes. This year, Debra has outraised and outhustled her Republican opponent. But we’re struggling to keep up with the Koch Brothers support for Debra’s opponent. They’ve already dumped over $140,000 into defeating Debra, and this is our best chance to fight back and get voters the truth. = =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Educators around the country are watching these elections in Virginia to see if it’s safe to run for office and if they’ll have the support they need to win. If the far right can defeat educators like Debra, it’s going to be harder to encourage great teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and education support professionals to stand for public office. And that means we all lose. But with your support, we can show educators that we have their backs and show them that they too can have a fair shot at winning in 2022. Friend,
**Here is the truth, Joe Biden’s Presidency is a sham.**
Just look at everything he has done in **less than NINE MONTHS:**

* He has _failed_ to stop the COVID-19 Pandemic and now is _forcing_ an unconstitutional shot mandate
* Sent our Country into soaring debt
* Ruined our economy with _massive_ inflation, _soaring_ gas prices, and a job market that has not recovered due to his failed policies
* _Abandoned Americans_ in Afghanistan, leaving them defenseless against the Taliban
* Put our Allies in danger, by _defunding Israel’s Iron Dome_ by $1,000,000,000
* _Opened our border_ to cartels and Illegal Immigrants
* Destroyed Alaska’s energy by _shutting down_ ANWR.

Through all of this, he has yet to take accountability for his actions. But has the audacity to blame everyone else but himself. **They have even gone far enough to blame YOU.**
And right by his side for the last 20 years has been _Lisa Murkowski._ This is the type of failed leadership we can continue to expect if we don’t do anything.

name: David Chipman
subject: Why I’m standing with Gabby
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m reaching out to you with an important request today. But first, I wanted to give you some background about how I got involved at Giffords.
#

**_September Fundraising Drive_**
Deadline: 9/30
Email on record: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Suggested donation: $3
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210926-1-subs-b&t=1&refcode2=895_3935704_FF35tV&akid=895%2E3935704%2EFF35tV)**
Hello,
I’m reaching out to you with an important request today. But first, I wanted to give you some background about how I got involved at Giffords.
Following my retirement from the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives (ATF) after 25 years, I was awed by the courage of Gabby Giffords. I was captured by Gabby’s activism after surviving an assassination attempt and returning to work tirelessly as a force for change.
I was nominated to become ATF director but unfortunately the White House had to withdraw my nomination after an unfounded and false disinformation campaign by the pro-gun National Shooting Sports Foundation. It is clear that the NRA, NSSF, and the rest of the gun lobby will stop at nothing to fuel the cycle of violence where gun manufacturers -- absent fear of liability -- profit as public safety erodes. More criminals causing more Americans to buy guns in fear of armed criminals is a corrupt business model.
I am disappointed I will not have the opportunity to lead ATF, but I refuse to be defeated. The stakes are simply too high and there is no other line of defense. That is why I am doing everything I can to help Giffords, and why I have to ask:
[**Will you make a $3 contribution before the upcoming September 30th fundraising deadline? Your donation will help us show the gun lobby that we are fighting back. Pitch in here:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210926-1-subs-b&t=2&refcode2=895_3935704_FF35tV&akid=895%2E3935704%2EFF35tV)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210926-1-subs-b&t=21&refcode2=895_3935704_FF35tV&akid=895%2E3935704%2EFF35tV)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210926-1-subs-b&t=22&refcode2=895_3935704_FF35tV&akid=895%2E3935704%2EFF35tV)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210926-1-subs-b&t=23&refcode2=895_3935704_FF35tV&akid=895%2E3935704%2EFF35tV)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210926-1-subs-b&t=24&refcode2=895_3935704_FF35tV&akid=895%2E3935704%2EFF35tV)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210926-1-subs-b&t=25&refcode2=895_3935704_FF35tV&akid=895%2E3935704%2EFF35tV)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210926-1-subs-b&t=26&refcode2=895_3935704_FF35tV&akid=895%2E3935704%2EFF35tV)**
---
****
You might ask, why do I continue to do this work? You see, courage is contagious at Giffords in the same way it was when I was a young man arresting gun traffickers and hunting domestic terrorists. If Gabby can continue the fight, I too can get to work — especially when the work is risky, the outcomes are uncertain, but our nation's future is absolutely in the balance.
The gun lobby and the members of Congress they control want to stop the progress we’ve made before it gets any further.
With your help, they won’t succeed. We are going to make sure the NSSF, the NRA, and the rest of the gun lobby don’t get in our way of saving lives.
Thank you for supporting our mission.
All my best,
David Chipman
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210926-1-subs-b&t=27&refcode2=895_3935704_FF35tV&akid=895%2E3935704%2EFF35tV)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=895%2E3935704%2EFF35tV) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: BREAKING: Audit results in!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Oh yes, there was fraud. |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ffe14d2a62&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | **AUDIT RESULTS IN**
Dear ,

Today has been a whirlwind and I have been running around all day working with my esteemed colleagues to take the fight for election integrity to the NEXT LEVEL in light of the Maricopa Audit results – IN TONIGHT!

**And I just had to get this out to you as soon as I possibly could. Today is a day that we should always remember. Never in my life have I seen such evidence that there are Americans who would destroy America for political power. This is disgusting, and this is what we are fighting against!**

I feel like the wind has been knocked out of me. While I can’t believe that ANY American would disrespect the foundation of our Democracy to the degree the Democrats did in 2020, this stokes the fire in me even more – because this is just the beginning.

_It is just beginning._

**I need to communicate critical next steps with you that will take this fight to the next level, but first let me give you the highlights of a few of the results.**
* **There were more than 9,000 votes that were received and recorded than what was officially sent out.**
* **There were significantly more ballots cast than people who showed up to vote.**
* **There are over 255,000 early votes that were shown in the final vote count that WERE NOT reflected in the early votes recording file.**
* **2,382 voters cast votes in the county after moving away!**

As a result of the proceedings in which 2.1 million ballots were recounted over 100,000 man hours, it is crystal clear that the electoral votes need to be recalled. If we do not recall the electors, then America as we know it will be gone.

**For that reason, I am proud of our Senate President who recognized that this is not just an electoral issue – but a criminal one. Anyone who is willing to undermine America’s elections – the freest nation on earth – should see the rest of their days from a dank jail cell.**

_As a direct result of these findings, Senate President Karen Fann to Mark Brnovich, the Arizona Attorney General, calling for a criminal probe of these obvious instances of fraud in our electoral process._
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a69ba1cad5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _Those are just the high level points. But there were some seriously disturbing instances of fraud, highlighted just below..._

In particular, the Electoral Management System WAS connected to the internet – the day BEFORE the audit began.

**Not only that, legally protected election records were purposely and Illegally destroyed.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=499cd8bec7&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| There’s coincidence, and then there is absolute red-handed evidence.

**If you walk past a bank, and you see a guy wearing a mask carrying two bags with a dollar sign on it full of money, and then the news immediately reports a bank robbery – that’s not a coincidence, folks.**

**_And that’s what we are seeing here. We are seeing red handed evidence of thieves in the night stealing an election for political gain._**

And this is why I am proud to stand with proud Patriots like Wendy Rogers in calling for these next steps:
* Immediately Decertify the election while the investigative process is complete.
* Arrest everyone involved with tampering with election systems.
* Initiate an audit of Pima County to see just how wide the fraud is.

---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=dee04b47a6&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b4e287204b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Again, folks, this is a somber, historic day. **

**_But we cannot let these thieves get away with it. We have to prosecute those responsible. We have to complete the audit STATEWIDE. We have to continue to fight for election audits around the country. And then, we have to PROTECT what we fight for by electing Election Integrity Patriots to Secretary of State!_**

[And this is why I need your urgent support to reach this goal.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=68efb6011e&e=44b8c466b0) I need to raise $41,000 by the end of the month (days away) to reach our fundraising goal and keep this Election Integrity Campaign alive. We have to reach this number by the End of Quarter Deadline. [Can you help out with a donation today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=523d939123&e=44b8c466b0)

We have no time left. The Audit Results are in and this is go time.

**If we let the Democrats get away with this now, we will never have a free election again. We must strike hard and fast with the full force of the law and the Constitution. We cannot let our efforts in Arizona be in vain.**

Folks, I have to get back to it, we have big things in the works in this war for election integrity. And I have to get back to the war-room. [But our efforts in this fight have no meaning without your support at home.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=128b67aae2&e=44b8c466b0)

[_Can you make an urgent donation of $25, $50, or $100 tonight? Every dollar helps our on-the-ground effort!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4c7e5c39f9&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e31636a99d&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1aa3895d76&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. President Trump just endorsed my campaign. We must raise what is needed to defeat the corrupt Democrats. I have to raise $75k by the end of this month - literally days away - to meet my fundraising numbers. [Will you contribute $15, $35, $100 or more to help me get there?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ef045dcad7&e=44b8c466b0) Every amount helps!

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=bd41835c33) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=bd41835c33).

and I wanted to send you a quick update about the NRCC’s “Young Guns” program I initially mentioned to you on September 7th. If you recall, I’ll rece I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. |
---
Peter,

**We’re just four days away from the end of the 3rd quarter** and I wanted to send you a quick update about the NRCC’s “Young Guns” program I initially mentioned to you on September 7th.

If you recall, I’ll receive an invitation to join this elite program run by the NRCC if I’m able to **raise $250,000** in a single three-month quarter. The program will open many opportunities I don’t currently have access to.

**On September 7th I wrote to you that I had $91,000 left to raise before September 30th; as of this morning, that number now stands at $19,000.**

I would be profoundly upset if we came this close to reaching our goal and fell just short of hitting it. **[We’re working around the clock to make sure that doesn’t happen, which is why I’m asking for your immediate help.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=f030832aa0564ea5b936598c2314b6e1&_e=zfW3u6oMDYTyI72d0t5aNfZymysbtIrPBp7cNchwFGDLUuySbR-Z7KQ-x2DYwI4rPjgjlmqZ7QcEhxor7cZM6okdC5RxHnVGJ9rOXL6K6kYuIhxPnaP_43EAFKLAXGnmUbSTD69aPoXtREBJAWxoyJmya1EY_wrPquGw-74xkomzczmsKVF12FtIC06leQAnynuhIkUekJV2qmOs7hzuqukKksUwPXNCDPjnfNBg-JMwAwZKmCPfJ38HcaXkaEJHllpmgQEVpQ_wMy6H8vrqSb-CI73cWw--goaruJOBKei9yLjoZf51JR2_5wlUEvR_OG_JtwVF-59KBr0d6n3K-nwgNuhMwILLSynKdF0jCYY9xB9JlR38lsstHEXitbqMqDERO3W6xAlNJVbjTNUwl2hH7ipsBMq14afO6ldhOXRigWWszUWlYIokIsot-7guKk4V9VswiMuSzfjYG_7_2A%3D%3D)**

Peter,

Have you heard of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s “**Young Gun’s Program?** ” I hadn’t either until my first campaign for Congress last year.

I’d like to give you an explanation as to what the purpose of the program is and **[why I need your financial assistance to gain acceptance.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=f030832aa0564ea5b936598c2314b6e1&_e=zfW3u6oMDYTyI72d0t5aNfZymysbtIrPBp7cNchwFGDLUuySbR-Z7KQ-x2DYwI4rPjgjlmqZ7QcEhxor7cZM6okdC5RxHnVGJ9rOXL6K6kYuIhxPnaP_43EAFKLAXGnmUbSTD69aPoXtREBJAWxoyJmya1EY_wrPquGw-74xkomzczmsKVF12FtIC06leQAnynuhIkUekJV2qmOs7hzuqukKksUwPXNCDPjnfNBg-JPHmNkZOCy2BhbQCQ9Y95iu35q7zHnXGQ1xZshMZX3lIIb8IPvEjdivuu1ls8mwWZZFVwO1RAGOtqZLfVBgE4wbgYb5kOIt0e0mqTG-9nu16-JRWKhS7qNCDacjdihatW0wh5dPjCV2AgddQRe760jbu-GFM_6uABEcXRsFWZeOuohUGbVSljtdC9b_idz4XGuIbIuaNxKl0GNWkYgjSPIVTgNtw0rwYogZ0CskrNRiwA%3D%3D) **

The Young Guns program serves to help Republican candidates running in some of the most competitive districts around the country with a playbook on how to vanquish Democrat opposition, along with providing strategic support on everything from polling, fundraising, advertising and grassroots outreach. **Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C.** – and prove they can WIN.

If you recall, I’ll rece I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, We’re just four days away from the end of the 3rd quarter and I wanted to send you a quick update about the NRCC’s “Young Guns” program I initially mentioned to you on September 7th. If you recall, I’ll receive an invitation to join this elite program run by the NRCC if I’m able to raise $250,000 in a single three-month quarter. The program will open many opportunities I don’t currently have access to. On September 7th I wrote to you that I had $91,000 left to raise before September 30th; as of this morning, that number now stands at $19,000. I would be profoundly upset if we came this close to reaching our goal and fell just short of hitting it. \-----Forwarded message----- From: Alek Skarlatos - info@alekfororegon.com Date: September 7, 2021 Subject: Quick email about my September goal To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, Have you heard of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s “Young Gun’s Program? ” I hadn’t either until my first campaign for Congress last year. I’d like to give you an explanation as to what the purpose of the program is and The Young Guns program serves to help Republican candidates running in some of the most competitive districts around the country with a playbook on how to vanquish Democrat opposition, along with providing strategic support on everything from polling, fundraising, advertising and grassroots outreach. Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C. – and prove they can WIN. This year, I’m aiming to be one of the first candidates to qualify for the program because with my race expected to be one of the closest in the nation for a second year in a row, . If you’re interested in making an investment in flipping the House Republican, you needn’t look further than this email. I’m asking you to help me secure ‘Young Gun’ status this month with a ** to my campaign right now. body:
| **

Constitution allows Biden to mandate COVID vaccine. Federal government can do even more.**

* * *

Listen, Peter, we're trusting you to tell us the truth...

As you can see in the headline above, the liberal media outlets are pressuring for MORE vaccine mandates and we need to know if you think they're right.

| _The liberal media says_ the Constitution allows Joe Biden to impose a vaccination mandate on all airline travelers in the United States.

**Do you agree?**

[** ****No, it's an abuse of power ➞ **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=13d3dfc9bc4849918ac6eba4abe8aa7d&_e=5LuKJ_7Ry_DIZaKISGJNwFaBPuFoOXccBZS9OIgqXARIMTyKJxgf3LIoWrKaY4FiYAu4qPsZmTaV1y1iFSodcv-1F0cOsYRQsQ6YNZhNzCKtGi5DqlvOaQ6xTcUl4hbV21wmr67zj8Dj8uPrbNIK5ie1LnUNx5YjEG8EWozib1OQ35Lq5HE6CkT-0tkNVCJSD-bXw5Pay9YV8NWWSi29CP6aL4zjheM169Yf_WZHW2xQfDArldYJhnb0xlJ-1aHe8D83T4D61tk28KOG_zVbNsQ7rwGKrysrdAQ0Su2-QGv8wNkcbVn3ngAsIRwSpvd3X5CFLba68KrwrMj4HNkOA1dnS8L0Zc3pyBFQXuh4mijr_fm_uDtY2llJN-tzDwwwsJBFPf6gCgFTGlQd736ZJTKjdhVYfTyXEhhe3eSPfE3BdMO1x-omQNlTD0x4BuefjDeNdEORb6frMvvSDjBAshtZ09UqSo2DxvOPikYRXYM%3D)

[** ****Yes, I want him to ➞ **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=13d3dfc9bc4849918ac6eba4abe8aa7d&_e=5LuKJ_7Ry_DIZaKISGJNwFaBPuFoOXccBZS9OIgqXARIMTyKJxgf3LIoWrKaY4FiYAu4qPsZmTaV1y1iFSodcv-1F0cOsYRQsQ6YNZhNzCKtGi5DqlvOaQ6xTcUl4hbV21wmr67zj8Dj8uPrbNIK5ie1LnUNx5YjEG8EWozib1OQ35Lq5HE6CkT-0tkNVCJSD-bXw5Pay9YV8NWWSi29CP6aL4zjheM169Yf_WZHW2xQfDArldYJhnb0xlJ-1aHe8D83T4D61tk28KOG_zVbNltP2SJ7_zOEQ1TWXYzZpdOa_2cshw_7Z5uuHekZJKCmJZzAh-5I1XfbPgBc37eDB1hJ0xCtVw--etg94kr1MZZMD33ZrN-FER4PEF4qbG_M5JJubXtpH4I6knROKSD_ow8JNxYFLUWgRaFbEVkdlJAHmZ4ClW2Xan812MY0GWjWVpBNY1r7nn6voyWQr-9baullW3Fs3l_w9WD5Jlvd5e0%3D)

This has not become a reality yet, but with the latest vaccine mandates impacting nearly 100 million Americans, there’s no doubt that requiring airline travelers to present proof of vaccination could be next.

Is it an overreach? [**Respond now ➞**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=13d3dfc9bc4849918ac6eba4abe8aa7d&_e=5LuKJ_7Ry_DIZaKISGJNwFaBPuFoOXccBZS9OIgqXARIMTyKJxgf3LIoWrKaY4FiYAu4qPsZmTaV1y1iFSodcv-1F0cOsYRQsQ6YNZhNzCKtGi5DqlvOaQ6xTcUl4hbV21wmr67zj8Dj8uPrbNIK5ie1LnUNx5YjEG8EWozib1OQ35Lq5HE6CkT-0tkNVCJSD-bXw5Pay9YV8NWWSi29CP6aL4zjheM169Yf_WZHW2xQfDArldYJhnb0xlJ-1aHe8D83T4D61tk28KOG_zVbNoo8gxXwUDjcvHrkr2xhmX9EOn8srhp2Sxt8q30DTSKARXyS06A0U6B_Kt99Pz1A39_LxmSHyClZh4TydczyGXCq-h-5FV8YFa9Oa6gQU9OVatvBYBD5jxzgaNYJI1Znx4eZ7RiriZxDWtiScm-l3pwTfjk1FidK5xTU_o6DSWfCS1jtaiKBji2ryDC7zIzfu-a0fttTQj41XDdvYWj_pP0%3D)

**Please do not delay for even a second.** We need to hear back from you ASAP. _We need to know if you're still in support of limited government or if you have joined the Democrats and Joe Biden. Only with your input can we work to build a winning Republican strategy and retake the Senate_.

All you have to do is donate $10 or more to claim your official Team Fetterman yard sign.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210926-2783-header&t=1&akid=2783%2E434096%2ENyMTuM)
We've got big news to share with yinz...
**Yard signs are now in stock!!!** And we might be a *little* biased, but we think these union-made signs would look great in your yard, window, or really wherever you want.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20210926-2783&t=2&akid=2783%2E434096%2ENyMTuM)
[**_Chip in $10 or more, and we'll send you an official Team Fetterman yard sign straight to your door. And here's a BIG way we're planning on sweetening the deal: If you're located in Pennsylvania, John and Gisele *might* just hand deliver your sign to you._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20210926-2783&t=3&akid=2783%2E434096%2ENyMTuM) 👇
**[Get Your Yard Sign →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20210926-2783&t=4&akid=2783%2E434096%2ENyMTuM)**
**John and Gisele are planning to make a handful of stops across the Commonwealth to help personally deliver these awesome new signs — so by chipping in $10 or more, you could wind up with John and Gisele Fetterman knocking at your door!**
FYI, John was really clear to our team about keeping costs as low as possible on these — so $10 is just enough to cover printing, shipping, and distribution.
But if you can donate more than that, you'll be directly supporting other huge priorities for our campaign like our statewide organizing program, targeted digital ads, and keeping John and Gisele on the road meeting with voters across our big, beautiful Commonwealth.
[**_So, Peter, you in? Chip in $10 or more at this link, and you'll get your official Team Fetterman yard sign delivered straight to you. And if you're in PA, you might even wind up with these two at your front door!_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20210926-2783&t=5&akid=2783%2E434096%2ENyMTuM)
**[Get Your Yard Sign →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20210926-2783&t=6&akid=2783%2E434096%2ENyMTuM)**
Thanks,
— All of us at Team Fetterman HQ
P.S. We're so proud to share that these signs are union-made right here in Pittsburgh, PA. And we can't wait to ship them out all across Pennsylvania's 67 counties to show the size and strength of our campaign to elect John Fetterman. [** _Chip in $10 or more to this special link, and we'll send you an official Team Fetterman yard sign very soon._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20210926-2783&t=7&akid=2783%2E434096%2ENyMTuM)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210926-2783-footer&t=8&refcode2=2783_434096_NyMTuM&akid=2783%2E434096%2ENyMTuM)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=9&akid=2783%2E434096%2ENyMTuM)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=2783%2E434096%2ENyMTuM)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Nearly 100%!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Soto is a clone of Ilhan |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=7d152a4bee&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

I've always said that you can tell who a person is by their actions.

Darren Soto, the Democrat Congressman from Florida's 9th District, showed us exactly who he is. He's no moderate, he votes like a Squad member!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am the Christian patriot and combat vet [running to take back a tossup district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1a95a61089&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in the Orlando area. It's currently held by Darren Soto, a Democrat who does the bidding of the Squad!**

Most people don't know Darren Soto. He's not what you would call, a "leader".

But When the chips are down, he votes nearly 100% of the time with Squad member Ilhan Omar.

That's right. The same crazy who says the reason conservative native born Americans are afraid of massive illegal immigration is because we “are afraid to be outshined“ by those immigrants sneaking across our border.

Hard to believe Ilhan Omar is sitting in Congress, isn't it?

So why is Darren Soto, a career politician who tells us election after election that he is "moderate", voting nearly 100% with Ilhan Omar?
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=7ab44628f9&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Soto sponsored legislation to throw open our borders wide open earlier this year, to give 11 million illegal immigrants citizenship!

This from his own website:

_“After four years of President Trump’s unrelenting agenda of hatred and xenophobia against immigrants, we can now rest assured that we will have an immigration system centered on humanity, unity and opportunity. The priorities laid forth in the U.S. Citizenship Act of 2021 are a reflection of the critical role immigrant communities play in the prosperity and social fabric of our nation. We applaud President Biden’s legislation with Congresswoman Sanchez to provide a pathway to citizenship for 11 million undocumented immigrants, including DACA recipients, TPS holders and agricultural workers. Going forward, we will continue to work with President Biden to advance a bold vision for comprehensive immigration reform. This is only the beginning.”_

He thinks giving 11 million illegal immigrants citizenship is the beginning?!?

**I am the proud husband to a LEGAL immigrant, one who came here the right way. And this isn't it.**

Radicals like Soto and Omar are why the border is thrown totally open, why there is continuing humanitarian crisis and why President Trump's strong border policies have been discarded.

**When Soto votes 100% with Ilhan Omar, he's a radical. And he needs to be replaced in this dead-even Florida district!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=44fbc37cd6&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Gov. DeSantis has Florida on the right path. But America as a whole is on the WAY wrong path, thanks to the Democrats in DC.**

Ilhan Omar is an enemy of our country. She is what we need to fight against. She and Pelosi and AOC will destroy this country if they can.

The proof? Look at what is happening now! Border crisis, inflation, Afghanistan.... need I go on?

And Darren Soto is right there, cheering them on, voting 100% with all of it.

**Throw them all out, I say.**

_Why aren't Republicans in Congress pushing back against Joe Biden? _We must use the power of Congress to challenge and restrain Biden.

_I will stand up for America against Biden. Darren Soto will not. _Elect me and let's impeach him!

We need stronger leaders in Congress, patriots, to help! [Help me get elected and impeach Biden!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c60dc389a8&e=afa21b7626)

[I must raise $25k by the end of this month for my end-of-quarter deadline. I have just $5,900 more to go. Will you help me get there by contributing right now?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=84fd30af06&e=afa21b7626)

Time to stop the Squad and their enablers. Lets put a real check on Biden.

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=26f7de5200&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=163f9ea7d2&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=fafcc2100c&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. [I have a big deadline coming up at the end of this month and need to raise $25k before then. Can you help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f4bb59977b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
_William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense._
---
| |

**Our mailing address is:**
William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=a717589e24) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=a717589e24).
