name: STACEY ABRAMS UPDATE (via DCCC)
subject: STUNNING news from Georgia:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **[We're SO PROUD! Republicans thought they could get away with suppressing our right to vote and SABOTAGING our Democrats. Yet we just learned that because of Stacey Abrams' INCREDIBLE work, voter registration in Georgia has reached HISTORICALLY high levels. But the fight isn't over yet -- and Stacey knows we must protect our House Majority and defend pro-voting rights House Democrats nationwide. Can we count on you to rush in $3 before our End of Quarter Deadline expires in 96 hours to elect pro-voting rights House Democrats?](https://links.e.dccc.)**

We're over the moon!!

**FIRST:**

Republicans in Georgia and across the country launched an OUTRAGEOUS campaign to UNDERMINE our voting rights and SABOTAGE our Democrats.

**BUT THEN:**

Stacey Abrams REFUSED to give in to their attacks -- and jumped into action to SAVE our democracy!

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_qfgL_)

**AND NOW:**

Because of Stacey's STUNNING work, nearly 95% of eligible voters in Georgia are registered to vote -- _**a HISTORIC voting rights victory in the face of Republican sabotage!**_

We are _SO PROUD_ of our Democratic hero Stacey Abrams.

But like Stacey always says, our work is not done yet.

**As we write this, Republicans nationwide are still working overtime to suppress our right to vote and stop Democrats from EVER winning again.**

And since our House Majority is a crucial line of defense for voting rights nationwide...

_**...it 's never been more important that grassroots Democrats everywhere rise up in HISTORIC numbers to help us defend our House Majority.**_

**[So please: Before our End of Quarter Deadline expires in just 96 hours, can we count on your $3 to ELECT pro-voting rights House Democrats and DEFEAT House Republicans who would undermine our democracy?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Big Pharma puppets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Here’s a rundown of how corporate Democrats are blocking even the most
basic health care reform to combat skyrocketing drug costs: Lowering
prescription drug costs for all.

First, Senator Joe Manchin said he’d vote NO on the $3.5 trillion spending
bill that includes economic relief for the 99 percent and climate action
to save the planet. That’s a win for Big Pharma and the fossil fuel
industry.

Then, three corporate Democrats in the U.S. House blocked a provision in
the spending bill to lower prescription drug costs in a committee vote.
Another win for Big Pharma.

THEN, Senator Kyrsten Sinema said she opposed Democratic plans to lower
prescription drug prices. She even opposes the centrist proposal to limit
the cost-savings for everyday people. Big Pharma is 3-for-3.

This is the most basic reform Democrats could pass to curb the greed and
massive profits of Big Pharma companies AND help everyday people afford
their insulin and other life saving medications.

Establishment Democrats have run on lowering drug prices for years. Now
that they’re in power, they’re coming up with excuses.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/68963?refcode=em20210926-19725&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=19725%2E1203867%2E8kdjh7 ]This is why we need to elect Justice Democrats to Congress. Corporate
Democrats want the status quo, and that’s just not good enough. Donate
$3 right now to help us elect a wave of Justice Democrats
to Congress and combat Big Pharma’s influence in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/68963?refcode=em20210926-19725&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=19725%2E1203867%2E8kdjh7 ]Contribute $3

We have a chance to transform the Democratic Party and make real progress
in this country.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=19725%2E1203867%2E8kdjh7 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=19725%2E1203867%2E8kdjh7 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20210926-19725-footer&t=1025&refcode2=19725_1203867_8kdjh7&akid=19725%2E1203867%2E8kdjh7

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=19725%2E1203867%2E8kdjh7

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
